items.title: Hermes: Enhancing Layer-7 Cloud Load Balancers with Userspace-Directed I/O Event Notification.
items.abstract:
Layer-7 load balancers (L7 LBs) improve service performance, availability, and scalability in public clouds. They rely on I/O event notification mechanisms such as epoll to dispatch connections from the kernel to userspace workers. However, early epoll versions suffered from the thundering herd problem. Epoll exclusive (available since Linux 4.5) mitigates this but introduces LIFO wakeups, causing connection concentration on a few workers. Reuseport (Linux 3.9) hashes connections across workers but suffers from hash collisions and lacks awareness of worker load. Since each worker serves multi-tenant traffic, inter-worker load balancing is critical to avoid worker overload and preserve tenant performance isolation.

In this work, we present Hermes , a userspace-directed I/O event notification framework to enhance L7 LBs. Hermes uses userspace worker status to direct kernel-space connection dispatch. It implements lock-free concurrency management for inter-process worker status updates and retrievals, as well as scheduling decision synchronization from userspace to the kernel. In the kernel, Hermes leverages eBPF to non-intrusively override the reuseport socket selection for custom worker scheduling. Hermes has been deployed on O(100K) CPU cores in Alibaba Cloud, handling O(10M) RPS of traffic. It reduces daily worker hangs by 99.8% and lowers the unit cost of L7 LB infrastructure by 18.9%.
items.abstract_zh:
第 7 层负载均衡器 (L7 LB) 可提高公共云中的服务性能、可用​​性和可扩展性。它们依靠 I/O 事件通知机制（例如 epoll）将连接从内核分派到用户空间工作线程。然而，早期的 epoll 版本遭受了雷群问题的困扰。 Epoll 独有的（自 Linux 4.5 起可用）缓解了这种情况，但引入了 LIFO 唤醒，导致连接集中在少数工作人员上。 Reuseport (Linux 3.9) 对工作人员之间的连接进行哈希处理，但会遭受哈希冲突，并且缺乏对工作人员负载的了解。由于每个工作线程服务于多租户流量，因此工作线程间负载平衡对于避免工作线程过载和保持租户性能隔离至关重要。

在这项工作中，我们提出了 Hermes，一个用于增强 L7 LB 的用户空间定向 I/O 事件通知框架。 Hermes 使用用户空间工作状态来指导内核空间连接调度。它实现了进程间工作状态更新和检索的无锁并发管理，以及从用户空间到内核的调度决策同步。在内核中，Hermes 利用 eBPF 以非侵入方式覆盖重用端口套接字选择，以进行自定义工作调度。 Hermes 已部署在阿里云的 O(100K) 个 CPU 核上，处理 O(10M) RPS 的流量。它减少了 99.8% 的日常工作挂起，并将 L7 LB 基础设施的单位成本降低了 18.9%。

items.title: New Evolution of Hoyan: Enhancing Scalability, Usability, and Accuracy for Alibaba's Global WAN Verification.
items.abstract: The network verification system Hoyan has been deployed for Alibaba Cloud's wide-area network (WAN) for years and achieved considerable success in preventing misconfiguration-caused network incidents. However, recent years have seen the emergence of new challenges in scalability, usability , and accuracy for Hoyan. This paper presents the new evolution of Hoyan to address these challenges. First, to support the large increase in the number of routers and prefixes on our WAN, Hoyan's simulation has evolved from a centralized fashion to a distributed framework, which improves the efficiency by 5 times and can scale to O (10 4 ) routers, millions of prefixes, and billions of flows. Second, to improve Hoyan's usability in checking route change intents, we developed a specification language RCL , which supports the easy specification and automatic verification of route change intents. Third, to ensure high accuracy we enhanced Hoyan's accuracy diagnosis framework, which helped us identify and fix dozens of implementation and modeling issues. Hoyan is used on a daily basis for our WAN. It supports O (100) verification requests each week, prevents O (10) incidents each year, and helps reduce the percentage of misconfiguration-caused network incidents from 56% to 5%.
items.abstract_zh: 网络验证系统Hoyan已在阿里云广域网（WAN）部署多年，在防止错误配置导致的网络事件方面取得了相当大的成功。然而，近年来，Hoyan 在可扩展性、可用性和准确性方面出现了新的挑战。本文介绍了 Hoyan 为应对这些挑战而进行的新演变。首先，为了支持广域网上路由器和前缀数量的大量增加，Hoyan的模拟从集中式方式演变成分布式框架，效率提高了5倍，并且可以扩展到O（10 4 ）个路由器、数百万个前缀和数十亿个流量。其次，为了提高Hoyan在检查路由变更意图方面的可用性，我们开发了一种规范语言RCL，它支持路由变更意图的简单规范和自动验证。第三，为了确保高精度，我们增强了 Hoyan 的准确性诊断框架，该框架帮助我们识别并修复了数十个实施和建模问题。 Hoyan 每天都用于我们的 WAN。它每周支持 O(100) 次验证请求，每年防止 O(10) 次事件，并有助于将错误配置导致的网络事件的百分比从 56% 降低到 5%。

items.title: Astral: A Datacenter Infrastructure for Large Language Model Training at Scale.
items.abstract: The flourishing of Large Language Models (LLMs) calls for increasingly ultra-scale training. In this paper, we share our experience in designing, deploying, and operating our novel Astral datacenter infrastructure, along with operational lessons and evolutionary insights gained from its production use. Astral has three important innovations: (i) a same-rail interconnection network architecture on tier-2, which enables the scaling of LLM training. To physically deploy this high-density infrastructure, we introduce a distributed high-voltage direct current power system and a new air-liquid integrated cooling system. (ii) a full-stack monitoring system featuring cross-host and hierarchical logging correlation, which diagnoses failures at scale and precisely localizes root causes. (iii) an operator-granular forecasting component Seer that efficiently generates operator execution timelines with acceptable accuracy, aiding in fault diagnosis, model tuning, and network architecture upgrading. Astral infrastructure has been gradually deployed over 18 months, supporting LLM training and inference for multiple customers.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的蓬勃发展需要越来越大规模的培训。在本文中，我们分享了我们在设计、部署和运营新型 Astral 数据中心基础设施方面的经验，以及从其生产使用中获得的运营经验教训和演变见解。 Astral 拥有三项重要创新：(i) 第二层同轨互连网络架构，可实现 LLM 培训的扩展。为了物理部署这种高密度基础设施，我们引入了分布式高压直流电源系统和新型气液集成冷却系统。 (ii) 具有跨主机和分层日志关联的全栈监控系统，可大规模诊断故障并精确定位根本原因。 (iii) 算子粒度预测组件 Seer，能够以可接受的精度高效生成算子执行时间线，有助于故障诊断、模型调整和网络架构升级。 Astral 基础设施已在 18 个月内逐步部署，支持多个客户的 LLM 培训和推理。

items.title: CEIO: A Cache-Efficient Network I/O Architecture for NIC-CPU Data Paths.
items.abstract: Efficient Input/Output (I/O) data path between NICs and CPUs/DRAMs is critical for supporting datacenter applications with high-performance network transmission, especially as link speed scales to 100Gbps and beyond. Traditional I/O acceleration strategies, such as Data Direct I/O (DDIO) and Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA), perform suboptimally due to the inefficient utilization of the Last-Level Cache (LLC). This paper presents CEIO, a novel cache-efficient network I/O architecture that employs proactive rate control and elastic buffering to achieve zero LLC misses in the I/O data path while ensuring the effectiveness of DDIO and RDMA under various network conditions. We have implemented CEIO on commodity SmartNICs and incorporated it into widely-used DPDK and RDMA libraries. Experiments with well-optimized RPC framework and distributed file system under realistic workloads demonstrate that CEIO achieves up to 2.9× higher throughput and 1.9× lower P99.9 latency over prior work.
items.abstract_zh: NIC 和 CPU/DRAM 之间的高效输入/输出 (I/O) 数据路径对于支持具有高性能网络传输的数据中心应用至关重要，尤其是当链路速度扩展到 100Gbps 及以上时。传统的 I/O 加速策略，例如数据直接 I/O (DDIO) 和远程直接内存访问 (RDMA)，由于末级缓存 (LLC) 的利用率低下，性能不佳。本文提出了 CEIO，一种新颖的高速缓存高效网络 I/O 架构，它采用主动速率控制和弹性缓冲来实现 I/O 数据路径中的零 LLC 缺失，同时确保 DDIO 和 RDMA 在各种网络条件下的有效性。我们在商用 SmartNIC 上实施了 CEIO，并将其纳入广泛使用的 DPDK 和 RDMA 库中。在实际工作负载下使用经过良好优化的 RPC 框架和分布式文件系统进行的实验表明，与之前的工作相比，CEIO 的吞吐量提高了 2.9 倍，P99.9 延迟降低了 1.9 倍。

items.title: Enabling Over-the-Air AI for Edge Computing via Metasurface-Driven Physical Neural Networks.
items.abstract: We present MetaAI, a novel wireless computing paradigm that integrates neural network computation directly into wireless signal propagation. Unlike traditional approaches that treat wireless channels as mere data conduits, MetaAI transforms them into active computing elements through programmable metasurfaces, enabling concurrent data transmission and neural network processing. By leveraging the inherent linearity of both wireless propagation and neural networks, our design resolves the fundamental mismatch between sequential wireless transmission and parallel neural computation, while supporting efficient multi-sensor late-stage data fusion. We implemented MetaAI using metasurfaces at both dual-band (2.4/5 GHz) and single-band (3.5 GHz) frequencies. Extensive experiments demonstrate robust performance across diverse classification tasks, achieving 82.8% average accuracy (up to 89.8%) even with a simple linear architecture. Multi-sensor fusion further improves accuracy by up to 27.06%. MetaAI represents a fundamental shift in Edge AI architecture, where wireless infrastructure becomes an integral part of the computing pipeline.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 MetaAI，一种新颖的无线计算范例，它将神经网络计算直接集成到无线信号传播中。与将无线通道视为单纯数据管道的传统方法不同，MetaAI 通过可编程超表面将它们转变为主动计算元素，从而实现并发数据传输和神经网络处理。通过利用无线传播和神经网络的固有线性，我们的设计解决了顺序无线传输和并行神经计算之间的根本不匹配问题，同时支持高效的多传感器后期数据融合。我们使用超表面在双频段 (2.4/5 GHz) 和单频段 (3.5 GHz) 频率下实现了 MetaAI。大量实验证明了在不同分类任务中的稳健性能，即使使用简单的线性架构也能达到 82.8% 的平均准确率（高达 89.8%）。多传感器融合进一步提高准确率高达 27.06%。 MetaAI 代表了边缘 AI 架构的根本性转变，其中无线基础设施成为计算管道不可或缺的一部分。

items.title: NPC: Rethinking Dataplane through Network-aware Packet Classification.
items.abstract: Packet classification is a critical component for accurately categorizing traffic in network systems. The efficiency of packet classification algorithms is primarily determined by two key factors: the classifier's data structure and the characteristics of the traffic being classified. While significant efforts have been made to optimize data structures, the potential of leveraging traffic characteristics remains underexplored. In this study, we revisit the network dataplane by integrating the network measurement module with the packet classification module. We propose an innovative Network-aware Packet Classification system (NPC) that utilizes sketch techniques to extract network traffic features. These features guide the construction of decision trees, enabling efficient and adaptable packet classification across diverse network environments. Experimental results demonstrate that the NPC achieves speedups ranging from 1.86× to 23.88× over state-of-the-art algorithms, while significantly reducing memory overhead and construction time, highlighting its practical value in real-world scenarios. Furthermore, integrating NPC into Open vSwitch (OVS) yields throughput improvements of 10.71× to 13.01× compared to the native OVS.
items.abstract_zh: 数据包分类是对网络系统中的流量进行准确分类的关键组件。数据包分类算法的效率主要由两个关键因素决定：分类器的数据结构和被分类的流量的特征。尽管我们在优化数据结构方面做出了巨大努力，但利用流量特征的潜力仍未得到充分开发。在本研究中，我们通过将网络测量模块与数据包分类模块集成来重新审视网络数据平面。我们提出了一种创新的网络感知数据包分类系统（NPC），该系统利用草图技术来提取网络流量特征。这些功能指导决策树的构建，从而在不同的网络环境中实现高效且适应性强的数据包分类。实验结果表明，NPC 比最先进的算法实现了 1.86 倍到 23.88 倍的加速，同时显着减少了内存开销和构建时间，凸显了其在现实场景中的实用价值。此外，与原生 OVS 相比，将 NPC 集成到 Open vSwitch (OVS) 中可将吞吐量提高 10.71 倍至 13.01 倍。

items.title: HACK: Homomorphic Acceleration via Compression of the Key-Value Cache for Disaggregated LLM Inference.
items.abstract:
Disaggregated Large Language Model (LLM) inference decouples the compute-intensive prefill stage from the memory-intensive decode stage, allowing low-end, compute-focused GPUs for prefill and high-end, memory-rich GPUs for decode, which reduces cost while maintaining high throughput. However, transmitting Key-Value (KV) data between the two stages can be a bottleneck, especially for long prompts. Additionally, the computational overhead in the two stages is key for optimizing Job Completion Time (JCT), and KV data size can become prohibitive for long prompts and sequences. Existing KV quantization methods can alleviate transmission and memory bottlenecks, but they introduce significant dequantization overhead, exacerbating the computation time.

We propose Homomorphic Acceleration via Compression of the KV cache (HACK) for disaggregated LLM inference. HACK eliminates the heavy KV dequantization and directly computes on quantized KV data to approximate and reduce the cost of expensive matrix multiplication. Extensive trace-driven experiments show that HACK reduces JCT by up to 70.9% compared to disaggregated LLM inference baseline and by up to 52.3% compared to state-of-the-art KV quantization methods.
items.abstract_zh:
分解大型语言模型 (LLM) 推理将计算密集型预填充阶段与内存密集型解码阶段解耦，允许使用低端、以计算为重点的 GPU 进行预填充，使用高端、内存丰富的 GPU 进行解码，从而在保持高吞吐量的同时降低成本。然而，在两个阶段之间传输键值（KV）数据可能是一个瓶颈，特别是对于长提示。此外，这两个阶段的计算开销是优化作业完成时间 (JCT) 的关键，并且 KV 数据大小对于长提示和序列来说可能会变得令人望而却步。现有的KV量化方法可以缓解传输和内存瓶颈，但它们引入了显着的反量化开销，从而加剧了计算时间。

我们提出通过压缩 KV 缓存的同态加速 (HACK) 来进行分解的 LLM 推理。 HACK消除了繁重的KV反量化，直接对量化的KV数据进行计算以近似并减少昂贵的矩阵乘法的成本。大量的跟踪驱动实验表明，与分解的 LLM 推理基线相比，HACK 将 JCT 减少了高达 70.9%，与最先进的 KV 量化方法相比，减少了高达 52.3%。

items.title: Fornax: A Hardware-Centric Session Management in Large Public Cloud Network.
items.abstract: SmartNIC is increasingly utilized to accelerate cloud network components. The effectiveness and correctness of hardware acceleration heavily rely on its management mechanism. Unfortunately, traditional management mechanisms adopt software-centric architecture, which treats flow as the basic management unit and completely relies on one-way commands to manage the flow table, making it challenging to support various cloud network scenarios while managing extremely large tables. In this paper, we advocate for a radical new mechanism to shift the management paradigm from software-centric architecture to hardware-centric architecture, which adopts session as the basic management unit and designs two-way protocols to facilitate the management process. We propose and implement a first-of-its-kind system, called Fornax, a novel management architecture for large public cloud networks. At the core of Fornax is leveraging a session-empowered hardware engine to provide various management capabilities. Besides, Fornax utilizes a light-weight software manager to enhance system scalability, and hardware-driven management protocols to improve resource efficiency. Our testbed evaluations demonstrate that Fornax can reduce the software storage usage by 80% and CPU usage by 77% with little hardware resource overhead. Our large-scale production results show that Fornax can manage up to 16M session entries while significantly reducing the resource overhead by over 79%.
items.abstract_zh: SmartNIC 越来越多地用于加速云网络组件。硬件加速的有效性和正确性很大程度上取决于其管理机制。遗憾的是，传统的管理机制采用以软件为中心的架构，以流为基本管理单元，完全依赖单向命令来管理流表，在管理超大表的同时，难以支持各种云网络场景。在本文中，我们提倡一种全新的机制，将管理范式从以软件为中心的架构转变为以硬件为中心的架构，采用会话作为基本管理单元，并设计双向协议来促进管理过程。我们提出并实施了一个名为 Fornax 的首创系统，这是一种针对大型公共云网络的新颖管理架构。 Fornax 的核心是利用会话授权的硬件引擎来提供各种管理功能。此外，Fornax利用轻量级软件管理器来增强系统可扩展性，并利用硬件驱动的管理协议来提高资源效率。我们的测试平台评估表明，Fornax 可以在几乎没有硬件资源开销的情况下将软件存储使用率降低 80%，CPU 使用率降低 77%。我们的大规模生产结果表明，Fornax 可以管理多达 16M 的会话条目，同时显着降低超过 79% 的资源开销。

items.title: Achieving High-Speed and Robust Encrypted Traffic Anomaly Detection with Programmable Switches.
items.abstract: Attacks against data centers are becoming more common as a result of the fast expansion of applications. In order to keep pace with the growing amount of data centers connected to their networks, internet service providers must offer comprehensive security services. However, existing network intrusion detection systems (NIDS) are either ineffective or inefficient for the high-speed encrypted network traffic. In this paper, we design and implement Mazu, an inline network intrusion detection system with programmable switches specifically developed to protect data centers connecting to the internet service provider. Mazu proposes a dual-plane feature extraction model to extract extensive traffic features at near line-speed. Mazu also proposes a lightweight one-class classification model that trains the best parameters exclusively on benign traffic to identify the malicious traffic. In addition, Mazu introduces an online update mechanism aimed at dynamically adjusting the detection model in response to environmental changes. Mazu has been in production for two years, during which time it has identified over 10 critical attack events and protect more than 10 million servers for two ISPs. Our production and testbed evaluations demonstrate that Mazu can detect malicious traffic entering the data center sites with approximately 90% accuracy within minutes.
items.abstract_zh: 由于应用程序的快速扩展，针对数据中心的攻击变得越来越普遍。 In order to keep pace with the growing amount of data centers connected to their networks, internet service providers must offer comprehensive security services.然而，现有的网络入侵检测系统（NIDS）对于高速加密网络流量要么无效要么效率低下。 In this paper, we design and implement Mazu, an inline network intrusion detection system with programmable switches specifically developed to protect data centers connecting to the internet service provider. Mazu提出了一种双平面特征提取模型，以近线速提取广泛的交通特征。 Mazu also proposes a lightweight one-class classification model that trains the best parameters exclusively on benign traffic to identify the malicious traffic.此外，Mazu还引入了在线更新机制，旨在根据环境变化动态调整检测模型。 Mazu has been in production for two years, during which time it has identified over 10 critical attack events and protect more than 10 million servers for two ISPs. Our production and testbed evaluations demonstrate that Mazu can detect malicious traffic entering the data center sites with approximately 90% accuracy within minutes.

items.title: Harnessing WebRTC for Large-Scale Live Streaming.
items.abstract: Live streaming that supports real-time interaction has become increasingly popular. To support the ensuing requirements on low end-to-end latency, RTM, the state-of-the-art live streaming system at Douyin, replaces the HTTP-FLV streaming protocol with WebRTC. To tailor the WebRTC stack to the live streaming scenario, we focus on optimizing first-frame delay, startup video rebuffering, audio-to-video drift, and per-session CPU usage. Those are the top-priority metrics identified from an importance analysis with respect to two user engagement metrics, i.e. , viewer penetration and viewing time. To date, WebRTC-based streaming in RTM has been in operation for 4 years, and serves billions of viewer sessions every day. It dramatically optimizes QoE metrics ( e.g. , end-to-end latency reduced by 54.5%), and delivers statistically significant user engagement gains ( e.g. , number of paid orders increased by 0.8%). In this paper, we report our deployment experiences comprehensively.
items.abstract_zh: 支持实时互动的直播越来越受欢迎。为了满足随之而来的低端到端延迟的要求，抖音最先进的直播系统RTM用WebRTC取代了HTTP-FLV流媒体协议。为了根据直播场景定制 WebRTC 堆栈，我们重点优化第一帧延迟、启动视频重新缓冲、音频到视频漂移和每个会话的 CPU 使用情况。这些是根据两个用户参与度指标（即观众渗透率和观看时间）的重要性分析确定的最优先指标。迄今为止，RTM 中基于 WebRTC 的流媒体已经运行了 4 年，每天为数十亿观众会话提供服务。它极大地优化了 QoE 指标（例如，端到端延迟减少了 54.5%），并提供了统计上显着的用户参与度增益（例如，付费订单数量增加了 0.8%）。在本文中，我们全面报告了我们的部署经验。

items.title: SaTE: Low-Latency Traffic Engineering for Satellite Networks.
items.abstract:
This paper explores traffic engineering (TE) for large-scale Low-Earth-Orbit satellite constellations. While there is rich prior work on TE algorithms for global cloud wide-area networks (WANs), they are designed for static network topologies and often require significant computation time for large-scale networks. Such limitations make existing WAN TE algorithms unsuitable for large-scale satellite networks which rapidly change topology and require computing optimal traffic allocation under stringent latency constraints.

We present SaTE, a low-latency TE algorithm for large-scale satellite networks, computing traffic allocation at millisecond latency. SaTE formulates a heterogeneous graph to model the TE problem, adapting to dynamic satellite topologies. By removing redundant graph relations, SaTE reduces computational latency, allowing the graph to be efficiently learned by a graph neural network that leverages GPUs to rapidly infer traffic allocations. SaTE also exploits the similarity of satellite network topologies and the geospatial distribution of traffic demands to facilitate model training. We evaluate SaTE through extensive data-driven simulation on today's largest satellite constellation, Starlink with 4236 satellites. Our results show over a 23.5% improvement in satisfied demand with an average TE runtime of 17 ms , achieving a 2738× speedup compared to commercial solvers.
items.abstract_zh:
本文探讨了大规模低地球轨道卫星星座的流量工程（TE）。虽然针对全球云广域网 (WAN) 的 TE 算法有丰富的先前工作，但它们是针对静态网络拓扑设计的，并且通常需要大量的计算时间来处理大型网络。这些限制使得现有的 WAN TE 算法不适合快速改变拓扑并需要在严格的延迟约束下计算最佳流量分配的大规模卫星网络。

我们提出了 SaTE，一种用于大规模卫星网络的低延迟 TE 算法，以毫秒延迟计算流量分配。 SaTE 制定异构图来模拟 TE 问题，适应动态卫星拓扑。通过消除冗余图关系，SaTE 减少了计算延迟，使图神经网络能够利用 GPU 快速推断流量分配，从而有效地学习图。 SaTE 还利用卫星网络拓扑的相似性和流量需求的地理空间分布来促进模型训练。我们通过对当今最大的卫星星座（拥有 4236 颗卫星的星链）进行广泛的数据驱动模拟来评估 SaTE。我们的结果显示，平均 TE 运行时间为 17 毫秒，满足的需求提高了 23.5%，与商业求解器相比，实现了 2738 倍的加速。

items.title: SkeletonHunter: Diagnosing and Localizing Network Failures in Containerized Large Model Training.
items.abstract:
The flexibility and portability characteristics have made containers a popular serverless environment for large model training in recent years. Unfortunately, these advantages render the network support for containerized large model training extremely challenging, due to the high dynamics of containers, the complex interplay between underlay and overlay networks, and the stringent requirements on failure detection and localization. Existing data center network debugging tools, which rely on comprehensive or opportunistic monitoring, are either inefficient or inaccurate in this setting.

This paper presents SkeletonHunter, a container network monitoring and diagnosis system that leverages the intrinsic and regular sparsity of the network traffic incurred by large model training. Its key idea is to reason about the traffic skeleton , which comprises a crucial set of network paths consistently traversed by the training traffic, so as to reliably detect and localize network failures in short time. We deployed it in production for six months, uncovering 4,816 network failures with 98.2% precision and 99.3% recall, and localizing them with a high accuracy of 95.7%. After fixing 98% problematic network components, the monthly network failure rate has significantly dropped by 99.1%.
items.abstract_zh:
灵活性和可移植性的特点使得容器成为近年来流行的大型模型训练的无服务器环境。不幸的是，由于容器的高动态性、底层网络和覆盖网络之间复杂的相互作用以及对故障检测和定位的严格要求，这些优势使得对容器化大型模型训练的网络支持变得极具挑战性。现有的数据中心网络调试工具依赖于全面或机会性监控，在这种情况下要么效率低下，要么不准确。

本文提出了 SkeletonHunter，这是一种容器网络监控和诊断系统，它利用了大型模型训练所产生的网络流量固有的和规律的稀疏性。其关键思想是对流量骨架进行推理，流量骨架由训练流量一致遍历的一组关键网络路径组成，以便在短时间内可靠地检测和定位网络故障。我们将其部署在生产环境中六个月，以 98.2% 的准确率和 99.3% 的召回率发现了 4,816 个网络故障，并以 95.7% 的高精度进行了定位。修复98%的问题网络组件后，月网络故障率大幅下降99.1%。

items.title: Direct-to-Cell Satellite Network without Satellite Navigation.
items.abstract: Direct-to-cell satellites enable global network services for our regular phones/IoTs via 4G, 5G, and beyond. To enforce highly available, trustworthy, and roaming policy-compliant network services, they heavily rely on user geolocation and timing information from external global navigation satellite systems (GNSS) to assist with their radio access, authentication, and authorization. Our analysis and field tests reveal that, this cross-technology over-reliance propagates satellite navigation's defects to direct-to-cell satellite networks, leading to diverse issues such as intermittent connectivity, over/under-billing, unauthorized services, and service denials even when direct-to-cell satellites are accessible. Our solution, SN 2 , adopts the "fate-sharing" principle to reuse direct-to-cell satellites themselves for self-navigating networks. By exploiting the flexible tradeoffs between satellite network availability and navigation accuracy, it enables "good enough" built-in navigation for highly available and functionally correct network services at a negligible cost of hardware or communication resources. Our evaluations with commodity satellite phones and 3GPP NTN protocol stacks demonstrate SN 2 's 4.4–23.5× network availability boost and 1.9–12.3× access latency reduction over legacy solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 直接到蜂窝卫星可以通过 4G、5G 等为我们的常规手机/物联网提供全球网络服务。为了实施高度可用、值得信赖且符合漫游策略的网络服务，他们严重依赖来自外部全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 的用户地理位置和定时信息来协助其无线电接入、身份验证和授权。我们的分析和现场测试表明，这种跨技术的过度依赖将卫星导航的缺陷传播到直接到蜂窝的卫星网络，导致各种问题，例如间歇性连接、超额/计费不足、未经授权的服务以及即使可以访问直接到蜂窝的卫星也拒绝服务。我们的解决方案 SN 2 采用“命运共享”原则，将直接到小区的卫星本身重新用于自导航网络。通过利用卫星网络可用性和导航精度之间的灵活权衡，它能够以可忽略不计的硬件或通信资源成本实现“足够好”的内置导航，以提供高度可用且功能正确的网络服务。我们对商用卫星电话和 3GPP NTN 协议栈的评估表明，与传统解决方案相比，SN 2 的网络可用性提高了 4.4–23.5 倍，访问延迟降低了 1.9–12.3 倍。

items.title: Edge Caching as Differentiation.
items.abstract: Consider an end-user accessing two content providers, A and B, of the same type. If the end-user's ISP prioritizes A-traffic over B-traffic, the end-user may experience A-content with significantly better quality, and the ISP is said to apply "traffic differentiation." We observe that edge caching has a similar effect: if the end-user's ISP hosts a cache that serves A-content with higher hit rate than B-content, the end-user may experience A-content with significantly better quality. Hence, we examine caching as differentiation: We consider 5 popular caching providers, measure the hit rates with which they serve different content, and use the measurements to quantify the impact of edge caching on end-user Quality of Experience (QoE). We present the—in our opinion—surprising QoE disparities that result from edge caching and discuss their implications.
items.abstract_zh: 考虑一个最终用户访问两个相同类型的内容提供商 A 和 B。如果最终用户的 ISP 将 A 流量优先于 B 流量，则最终用户可能会体验到质量明显更好的 A 内容，并且 ISP 据说会应用“流量差异化”。我们观察到边缘缓存具有类似的效果：如果最终用户的 ISP 托管的缓存提供的 A 内容的命中率高于 B 内容，则最终用户可能会体验到质量明显更好的 A 内容。因此，我们将缓存视为差异化：我们考虑 5 个流行的缓存提供商，测量它们提供不同内容的命中率，并使用测量结果来量化边缘缓存对最终用户体验质量 (QoE) 的影响。我们提出了我们认为由边缘缓存导致的令人惊讶的 QoE 差异，并讨论了它们的影响。

items.title: Hattrick: Solving Multi-Class TE using Neural Models.
items.abstract: While recent work shows ML-based approaches are a promising alternative to conventional optimization methods for Traffic Engineering (TE), existing research is limited to a single traffic class. In this paper, we present Hattrick, the first ML-based approach for handling multiple traffic classes, a key requirement of cloud and ISP WANs. As part of Hattrick we have developed (i) a novel neural architecture aligned with the sequence of optimization problems in multiclass TE; and (ii) a variant of classical multitask learning methods to deal with the unique challenge of optimizing multiple metrics that have a precedence relationship. Evaluations on a large private WAN and other public datasets show Hattrick outperforms state-of-the-art optimization-based multiclass TE methods by better coping with prediction error - e.g., for GEANT, Hattrick outperforms SWAN by 5.48% to 19.3% across classes when considering the traffic that can be supported 99% of the time.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然最近的研究表明基于机器学习的方法是流量工程 (TE) 传统优化方法的一种有前途的替代方法，但现有的研究仅限于单一流量类别。在本文中，我们介绍了 Hattrick，这是第一个基于 ML 的方法，用于处理多个流量类别，这是云和 ISP WAN 的关键要求。作为 Hattrick 的一部分，我们开发了 (i) 一种与多类 TE 中的优化问题序列相一致的新颖神经架构； (ii) 经典多任务学习方法的变体，用于应对优化具有优先关系的多个指标的独特挑战。对大型私有 WAN 和其他公共数据集的评估表明，Hattrick 通过更好地应对预测误差，优于最先进的基于优化的多类 TE 方法 - 例如，对于 GEANT，在考虑 99% 时间可支持的流量时，Hattrick 在各个类别中的性能优于 SWAN 5.48% 至 19.3%。

items.title: Raha: A General Tool to Analyze WAN Degradation.
items.abstract:
Raha is the first general tool that can analyze probable degradation of traffic engineered networks under arbitrary failures and traffic shifts to prevent outages. Raha addresses a significant gap in prior work which consider only (1) ≤ k failures; (2) specific traffic engineering schemes; and (3) the maximum impact of failures irrespective of the network design point.

Our insight is to formulate the problem in terms of heuristic analysis, where one seeks to maximize the performance gap between the network design point ( i.e. , the network with no failures) and the network under failures. We invent techniques that allow us to exploit the mechanisms within these tools to encode the problem into components which can handle them. We present extensive experiments on Microsoft's production network and those of Topology Zoo that demonstrate Raha is scalable and can effectively solve the problem. We use Raha to propose capacity augments that allow operators to mitigate potential problems and avoid future outages. Our results show Raha can find ≥ 2× higher degradations compared to those tools that only consider up to 2 failures.
items.abstract_zh:
Raha 是第一个通用工具，可以分析流量工程网络在任意故障和流量转移情况下可能出现的退化情况，以防止中断。 Raha 解决了先前工作中仅考虑 (1) ≤ k 故障的重大差距； （二）具体交通工程方案； (3) 无论网络设计点如何，故障的最大影响。

我们的见解是根据启发式分析来阐述问题，其中寻求最大化网络设计点（即没有故障的网络）与发生故障的网络之间的性能差距。我们发明了一些技术，使我们能够利用这些工具中的机制将问题编码到可以处理它们的组件中。我们在 Microsoft 的生产网络和 Topology Zoo 上进行了广泛的实验，证明 Raha 具有可扩展性并且可以有效解决问题。我们使用 Raha 来提出容量增强建议，使运营商能够减轻潜在问题并避免未来的中断。我们的结果表明，与那些只考虑最多 2 次故障的工具相比，Raha 可以发现 ≥ 2 倍的降级。

items.title: Mosaic: Breaking the Optics versus Copper Trade-off with a Wide-and-Slow Architecture and MicroLEDs.
items.abstract:
Link technologies in today's data center networks impose a fundamental trade-off between reach, power, and reliability. Copper links are power-efficient and reliable but have very limited reach (< 2 m). Optical links offer longer reach but at the expense of high power consumption and lower reliability. As network speeds increase, this trade-off becomes more pronounced, constraining future scalability.

We introduce Mosaic, a novel optical link technology that breaks this trade-off. Unlike existing copper and optical links, which rely on a narrow-and-fast architecture with a few high-speed channels, Mosaic adopts a wide-and-slow design, employing hundreds of parallel low-speed channels. To make this approach practical, Mosaic uses directly modulated microLEDs instead of lasers, combined with multicore imaging fibers, and replaces complex, power-hungry electronics with a low-power analog backend. Mosaic achieves 10× the reach of copper, reduces power consumption by up to 68%, and offers 100× higher reliability than today's optical links. We demonstrate an end-to-end Mosaic prototype with 100 optical channels, each transmitting at 2 Gbps, and show how it scales to 800 Gbps and beyond with a reach of up to 50 m. Mosaic is protocol-agnostic and seamlessly integrates with existing network infrastructure, providing a practical and scalable solution for future networks.
items.abstract_zh:
当今数据中心网络中的链路技术在覆盖范围、功率和可靠性之间进行了根本性的权衡。铜链路节能且可靠，但覆盖范围非常有限 (< 2 m)。光链路提供了更长的传输距离，但代价是高功耗和较低的可靠性。随着网络速度的提高，这种权衡变​​得更加明显，限制了未来的可扩展性。

我们推出了 Mosaic，这是一种打破这种权衡的新颖光链路技术。与现有的铜缆和光链路依赖于具有少量高速通道的窄而快速的架构不同，Mosaic 采用宽而慢的设计，采用数百个并行低速通道。为了使这种方法切实可行，Mosaic 使用直接调制的 microLED 代替激光器，与多芯成像光纤相结合，并用低功耗模拟后端取代复杂、耗电的电子设备。 Mosaic 的传输距离是铜的 10 倍，功耗降低高达 68%，可靠性比当今的光链路高 100 倍。我们演示了一个具有 100 个光通道的端到端 Mosaic 原型，每个光通道的传输速度为 2 Gbps，并展示了它如何扩展到 800 Gbps 及以上，传输距离可达 50 m。 Mosaic 与协议无关，可与现有网络基础设施无缝集成，为未来网络提供实用且可扩展的解决方案。

items.title: SyCCL: Exploiting Symmetry for Efficient Collective Communication Scheduling.
items.abstract: The performance of collective communication schedules is crucial for the efficiency of machine learning jobs and GPU cluster utilization. Existing open-source collective communication libraries (such as NCCL and RCCL) rely on fixed schedules and cannot adjust to varying topology and model requirements. State-of-the-art collective schedule synthesizers (such as TECCL and TACCL) utilize Mixed Integer Linear Program for modeling but encounter search space explosion and scalability challenges. In this paper, we propose SyCCL, a scalable collective schedule synthesizer that aims to synthesize near-optimal schedules in tens of minutes for production-scale machine-learning jobs. SyCCL leverages collective and topology symmetries to decompose the original collective communication demand into smaller sub-demands within smaller topology subsets. SyCCL proposes efficient search strategies to quickly explore potential sub-demands, synthesizes corresponding sub-schedules, and integrates these sub-schedules into complete schedules. Our 32-A100 testbed and production-scale simulation experiments show that SyCCL improves collective performance by up to 127% while reducing synthesis time by 2 to 4 orders of magnitude compared to state-of-the-art efforts.
items.abstract_zh: 集体通信调度的性能对于机器学习作业的效率和 GPU 集群的利用率至关重要。现有的开源集体通信库（例如 NCCL 和 RCCL）依赖于固定的时间表，无法适应不同的拓扑和模型要求。最先进的集体调度合成器（例如 TECCL 和 TACCL）利用混合整数线性程序进行建模，但遇到搜索空间爆炸和可扩展性挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 SyCCL，一种可扩展的集体调度合成器，旨在在数十分钟内为生产规模的机器学习作业合成接近最优的调度。 SyCCL 利用集体和拓扑对称性将原始集体通信需求分解为较小拓扑子集中的较小子需求。 SyCCL提出高效的搜索策略来快速探索潜在的子需求，合成相应的子时间表，并将这些子时间表整合成完整的时间表。我们的 32-A100 测试台和生产规模模拟实验表明，与最先进的技术相比，SyCCL 将总体性能提高了 127%，同时将合成时间缩短了 2 到 4 个数量级。

items.title: Reliable and Decentralized Certificate Revocation via DNS: The Case for RevDNS.
items.abstract:
The Online Certificate Status Protocol's long slide—after 25 years of soft-fail rules, privacy leakage, and shaky infrastructure—exposes a deeper failure in web-PKI revocation. Certificate Authorities increasingly route OCSP traffic through CDNs for speed, yet this recentralizes trust: our measurements show Akamai serves 62 percent of all revocation responses, creating single points of failure and betraying PKI's decentralized ideals.

We present RevDNS, a DNS-based revocation scheme that drops CDN dependence while preserving real-time guarantees. Revoked serial numbers live in DNSSEC-signed TXT records; NSEC proofs allow aggressive negative caching, so recursive resolvers answer 99.8 percent of checks without bothering a CA. From 1.1 billion certificates and 5 million revocations, we find a large CA such as Let's Encrypt can publish data for 612 million certificates in a 345 MB zone, with resolvers shouldering nearly every lookup.

Because answers piggyback on ordinary DNS lookups, RevDNS adds no latency and discloses no more about users than standard DNS traffic. By keeping revocation authority with CAs and avoiding fragile hacks like short-lived certificates, RevDNS delivers a durable, decentralized path for TLS revocation—one that finally aligns operational practicality with the web's security ambitions.
items.abstract_zh:
在线证书状态协议的长期下滑——经过 25 年的软失败规则、隐私泄露和不稳定的基础设施——暴露了网络 PKI 撤销方面更深层次的失败。证书颁发机构越来越多地通过 CDN 路由 OCSP 流量以提高速度，但这会重新集中信任：我们的测量显示 Akamai 服务了 62% 的吊销响应，从而造成了单点故障并违背了 PKI 的去中心化理念。

我们提出了 RevDNS，这是一种基于 DNS 的撤销方案，可以在保持实时保证的同时消除对 CDN 的依赖。已撤销的序列号存在于 DNSSEC 签名的 TXT 记录中； NSEC 证明允许积极的负缓存，因此递归解析器可以回答 99.8% 的检查，而无需打扰 CA。从 11 亿个证书和 500 万个吊销中，我们发现像 Let's Encrypt 这样的大型 CA 可以在 345 MB 区域中发布 6.12 亿个证书的数据，解析器几乎承担所有查找。

由于答案搭载在普通 DNS 查找上，因此 RevDNS 不会增加延迟，并且不会比标准 DNS 流量透露更多有关用户的信息。通过保留 CA 的撤销权限并避免诸如短期证书之类的脆弱黑客攻击，RevDNS 为 TLS 撤销提供了一条持久、去中心化的路径，最终使操作实用性与网络的安全目标保持一致。

items.title: DNSLogzip: A Novel Approach to Fast and High-Ratio Compression for DNS Logs.
items.abstract:
Domain Name System (DNS) logs capture detailed records of the queries and responses exchanged between DNS servers and clients, playing a crucial role in applications such as cybersecurity monitoring and regulatory compliance, which often require long-term data retention. With the rapid growth of Internet traffic, the volume of DNS logs has surged, presenting significant storage challenges. Although many DNS operators use general-purpose compression algorithms to reduce storage costs, these solutions fail to fully exploit the unique characteristics of DNS data, leading to inefficiencies and rising storage demands.

In this work, we propose a novel solution, DNSLogzip , designed to achieve lossless, fast, and high-ratio compression for DNS logs. Built on in-depth empirical studies of real-world DNS log datasets, we identify four key inter-line and intra-line characteristics that enable effective reduction of redundancies without information loss. DNSLogzip leverages these insights through a modular compression architecture, which allows it to handle varying log formats and offers easy integration and customization based on specific requirements. We have deployed DNSLogzip on two tier-1 Internet Service Providers (ISPs) to compress production logs. The results show that DNSLogzip can reduce storage costs by approximately two-thirds, potentially saving up to $163,000 per DNS service node per month.
items.abstract_zh:
域名系统 (DNS) 日志捕获 DNS 服务器和客户端之间交换的查询和响应的详细记录，在网络安全监控和法规遵从性等通常需要长期数据保留的应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。随着互联网流量的快速增长，DNS日志量激增，给存储带来了巨大的挑战。尽管许多 DNS 运营商使用通用压缩算法来降低存储成本，但这些解决方案未能充分利用 DNS 数据的独特特征，导致效率低下和存储需求不断上升。

在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的解决方案 DNSLogzip ，旨在实现 DNS 日志的无损、快速和高比率压缩。基于对现实世界 DNS 日志数据集的深入实证研究，我们确定了四个关键的行间和行内特征，这些特征能够有效减少冗余而不丢失信息。 DNSLogzip 通过模块化压缩架构利用这些见解，使其能够处理不同的日志格式，并根据特定要求提供轻松的集成和定制。我们在两个一级互联网服务提供商 (ISP) 上部署了 DNSLogzip 以压缩生产日志。结果显示，DNSLogzip 可以将存储成本降低约三分之二，每个 DNS 服务节点每月可能节省高达 163,000 美元。

items.title: Censys: A Map of Internet Hosts and Services.
items.abstract: In 2015, we released Censys to lower the barrier to entry for researchers to study Internet devices by continually collecting and packaging Internet scan data. Since then, as we have learned more about how best to capture the complex behavior of Internet services and begun to serve commercial and government users, we have re-architected every aspect of how Censys operates. Motivated by requests from the community,we present Censys' evolution and current architecture, evaluate its visibility, and detail how Censys has been used by research, industry, and government. Finally, informed by our operational experiences, we discuss unsolved problems and the lessons we have learned. We hope that our work provides the transparency needed for researchers to soundly use Censys data and offers directions for future research.
items.abstract_zh: 2015 年，我们发布了 Censys，通过不断收集和打包互联网扫描数据来降低研究人员研究互联网设备的准入门槛。从那时起，随着我们更多地了解如何最好地捕获互联网服务的复杂行为并开始为商业和政府用户提供服务，我们重新构建了 Censys 运营方式的各个方面。在社区请求的推动下，我们介绍了 Censys 的演变和当前架构，评估了其可见性，并详细介绍了研究、行业和政府如何使用 Censys。最后，根据我们的运营经验，我们讨论了未解决的问题和我们吸取的教训。我们希望我们的工作为研究人员提供合理使用 Censys 数据所需的透明度，并为未来的研究提供方向。

items.title: Wisely Optimizing Short Video Streaming for a User-Vendor Win-Win Outcome.
items.abstract: Short video streaming platforms widely employ video prefetching to ensure users' quality of experience (QoE), but frequent user swipes lead to massive data wastage, creating a significant financial burden for vendors. Existing academic and industrial solutions fail to strike a balance, often sacrificing either data savings or the authentic user-perceived QoE. We introduce a framework that intelligently reduces streaming data consumption without compromising user experience. The core idea is to make prefetching decisions adaptive to both user swiping behavior and dynamic network conditions. Real-world evaluations show our framework significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art solutions on data wastage as well as user-perceived QoE.
items.abstract_zh: 短视频流媒体平台广泛采用视频预取来保证用户的体验质量（QoE），但用户频繁的刷屏会导致大量数据浪费，给厂商带来巨大的经济负担。现有的学术和工业解决方案无法取得平衡，通常会牺牲数据节省或真实的用户感知 QoE。我们引入了一个框架，可以在不影响用户体验的情况下智能地减少流数据消耗。核心思想是使预取决策适应用户滑动行为和动态网络条件。现实世界的评估表明，我们的框架在数据浪费以及用户感知的 QoE 方面显着优于最先进的解决方案。

items.title: RANBooster: Democratizing advanced cellular connectivity through fronthaul middleboxes.
items.abstract: The 5G Radio Access Network has shifted towards virtualization and disaggregation. This change aims to reduce costs and foster innovation by promoting vendor interoperability and by expanding the ecosystem. In this environment, smaller RAN vendors and open-source projects have emerged, focusing on low-cost, modular stacks. However, challenges such as achieving state-of-the-art performance and accessing data and control knobs hinder their widespread adoption. To address these issues, we propose a middlebox architecture, called RANBooster, that enhances the RAN capabilities without modifying existing network functions, by leveraging the open fronthaul interface. To demonstrate the benefits of the RANBooster framework, we build four reference applications (distributed antenna system, distributed MIMO, RU sharing, realtime physical resource block monitoring), and evaluate them on an enterprise-scale, commercial-grade 5G testbed.
items.abstract_zh: 5G 无线接入网络已转向虚拟化和分解。这一变化旨在通过促进供应商互操作性和扩展生态系统来降低成本并促进创新。在这种环境下，规模较小的 RAN 供应商和开源项目应运而生，专注于低成本、模块化堆栈。然而，实现最先进的性能以及访问数据和控制旋钮等挑战阻碍了它们的广泛采用。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种称为 RANBooster 的中间盒架构，通过利用开放前传接口，在不修改现有网络功能的情况下增强 RAN 功能。为了展示 RANBooster 框架的优势，我们构建了四个参考应用（分布式天线系统、分布式 MIMO、RU 共享、实时物理资源块监控），并在企业级商业级 5G 测试台上对其进行评估。

items.title: ParserHawk: Hardware-aware parser generator using program synthesis.
items.abstract:
Parser programs are becoming increasingly complex to accommodate intricate network packet formats and advanced protocols. Existing parser compilers incorporate predefined program rewrite rules to output the low-level parser implementation. Yet, these rules are often brittle and sensitive to how the input parser program is written. As a result, generated implementations could consume more hardware resources than necessary. In some cases, these compilers unnecessarily reject valid parser programs that could have fit within the target device parser's resource constraints.

We leverage program-synthesis-based techniques to build a parser compiler, ParserHawk, for 2 network devices: the Intel Infrastructure Processing Unit (IPU) and the Barefoot Tofino programmable switch. Naively formulating code generation as a program synthesis problem can take hours, if not days, to complete. As a result, ParserHawk incorporates several optimization algorithms, which achieve a geometric mean speed-up of 309.44×. Within a compile time on the order of minutes for most benchmarks, ParserHawk can correctly compile parser programs rejected by existing compilers and can generate parser implementations that use fewer hardware resources.
items.abstract_zh:
解析器程序变得越来越复杂，以适应复杂的网络数据包格式和高级协议。现有的解析器编译器合并预定义的程序重写规则来输出低级解析器实现。然而，这些规则通常很脆弱，并且对输入解析器程序的编写方式很敏感。因此，生成的实现可能会消耗比必要的更多的硬件资源。在某些情况下，这些编译器不必要地拒绝可能适合目标设备解析器资源限制的有效解析器程序。

我们利用基于程序综合的技术为 2 个网络设备构建解析器编译器 ParserHawk：Intel 基础设施处理单元 (IPU) 和 Barefoot Tofino 可编程交换机。将代码生成简单地表述为程序综合问题可能需要数小时甚至数天才能完成。因此，ParserHawk 结合了多种优化算法，实现了 309.44 倍的几何平均加速。对于大多数基准测试而言，在几分钟的编译时间内，ParserHawk 可以正确编译现有编译器拒绝的解析器程序，并且可以生成使用更少硬件资源的解析器实现。

items.title: Designing Transport-Level Encryption for Datacenter Networks.
items.abstract: This paper presents SDP, a protocol design for emerging datacenter transports, such as NDP and Homa, to integrate data encryption. It supports NIC offloading designed for TLS over TCP, native protocol number alongside TCP and UDP, and message-based abstraction that enables low latency RPCs with fine-grained parallelism.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 SDP，这是一种针对新兴数据中心传输（例如 NDP 和 Homa）的协议设计，用于集成数据加密。它支持专为 TCP 上的 TLS 设计的 NIC 卸载、TCP 和 UDP 的本机协议号以及基于消息的抽象，可实现具有细粒度并行性的低延迟 RPC。

items.title: ByteScale: Communication-Efficient Scaling of LLM Training with a 2048K Context Length on 16384 GPUs.
items.abstract:
Scaling long-context ability is essential for Large Language Models (LLMs). To amortize the memory consumption across multiple devices in long-context training, inter-data partitioning (a.k.a. Data Parallelism) and intra-data partitioning (a.k.a. Context Parallelism) are commonly used. Current training frameworks predominantly treat the two techniques as orthogonal, and establish static communication groups to organize the devices as a static mesh (e.g., a 2D mesh). However, the sequences for LLM training typically vary in lengths, no matter for texts, multi-modalities or reinforcement learning. The mismatch between data heterogeneity and static mesh causes redundant communication and imbalanced computation, degrading the training efficiency.

In this work, we introduce ByteScale, an efficient, flexible, and scalable LLM training framework for large-scale mixed training of long and short sequences. The core of ByteScale is a novel parallelism strategy, namely Hybrid Data Parallelism (HDP), which unifies the inter- and intra-data partitioning with a dynamic mesh design. In particular, we build a communication optimizer, which eliminates the redundant communication for short sequences by data-aware sharding and dynamic communication, and further compresses the communication cost for long sequences by selective offloading. Besides, we also develop a balance scheduler to mitigate the imbalanced computation by parallelism-aware data assignment. We evaluate ByteScale with the model sizes ranging from 7B to 141B, context lengths from 256K to 2048K, on a production cluster with 16384 GPUs. Experiment results show that ByteScale outperforms the state-of-the-art training system by up to 7.89×.
items.abstract_zh:
扩展长上下文能力对于大型语言模型 (LLM) 至关重要。为了在长上下文训练中分摊多个设备上的内存消耗，通常使用数据间分区（也称为数据并行性）和数据内分区（又称为上下文并行性）。当前的训练框架主要将这两种技术视为正交，并建立静态通信组以将设备组织为静态网格（例如，2D 网格）。然而，无论是文本、多模态还是强化学习，法学硕士培训的序列通常长度各不相同。数据异构性和静态网格之间的不匹配导致冗余通信和不平衡计算，降低训练效率。

在这项工作中，我们介绍了 ByteScale，一种高效、灵活、可扩展的 LLM 训练框架，用于长短序列的大规模混合训练。 ByteScale的核心是一种新颖的并行策略，即混合数据并行（HDP），它将数据间和数据内分区与动态网格设计相结合。特别是，我们构建了一个通信优化器，通过数据感知分片和动态通信消除了短序列的冗余通信，并通过选择性卸载进一步压缩长序列的通信成本。此外，我们还开发了一个平衡调度程序，通过并行感知数据分配来减轻不平衡计算。我们在具有 16384 个 GPU 的生产集群上使用从 7B 到 141B 的模型大小、从 256K 到 2048K 的上下文长度来评估 ByteScale。实验结果表明，ByteScale 的性能比最先进的训练系统高出 7.89 倍。

items.title: Low-Overhead Distributed Application Observation with DeepTrace: Achieving Accurate Tracing in Production Systems.
items.abstract: As microservices grow in scale and complexity, their operation and debugging become increasingly challenging. Even a single user request can involve interactions across hundreds of components. In such intricate systems, distributed tracing, which tracks the end-to-end execution flow of requests, has become a critical monitoring tool. Among these, non-intrusive tracing frameworks that do not require code modification are particularly valued for their convenience. However, existing non-intrusive solutions either have limited applicability or lack sufficient accuracy under high concurrency. To address these challenges, we propose DeepTrace, a transaction-based, non-intrusive distributed tracing framework designed for microservices. DeepTrace leverages API endpoints and transaction fields embedded within request content to categorize requests into distinct transactions, thereby reducing the likelihood of incorrectly merging traces from different transactions. Compared to state-of-the-art frameworks, DeepTrace maintains an accuracy rate of over 95% even under high concurrency. It has also been adopted by dozens of companies in their production systems for tasks such as failure diagnosis and resource optimization.
items.abstract_zh: 随着微服务规模和复杂性的增长，其操作和调试变得越来越具有挑战性。即使单个用户请求也可能涉及数百个组件之间的交互。在如此复杂的系统中，跟踪请求的端到端执行流程的分布式跟踪已成为关键的监控工具。其中，不需要修改代码的非侵入式跟踪框架因其便利性而特别受到重视。然而，现有的非侵入式解决方案要么适用性有限，要么在高并发下缺乏足够的准确性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 DeepTrace，这是一种专为微服务设计的基于事务的非侵入式分布式跟踪框架。 DeepTrace 利用请求内容中嵌入的 API 端点和事务字段将请求分类为不同的事务，从而降低错误合并来自不同事务的跟踪的可能性。与最先进的框架相比，DeepTrace 即使在高并发下也能保持超过 95% 的准确率。它还被数十家公司在其生产系统中采用，用于故障诊断和资源优化等任务。

items.title: Discovering Millions of New Nodes and Links in the Internet by Challenging the Uniformity Assumption in Multipath Detection.
items.abstract: Multipath Detection Algorithms (MDAs) are proposed to discover Internet topology in the presence of load balancing (LB). Existing methods assume uniformity in the load-balancing responses (LBR), i.e. , responses from the successors of a LB router. However, we reveal that only 20% of the cases exhibit uniformity in the Internet. This finding significantly challenges the completeness of the Internet topology discovered using current MDAs. In this paper, we propose a novel system BayMuDA, that can estimate LBR distributions and calculate the minimum number of probes needed to statistically discover all nodes and links within a given hop. The validation on controlled topologies shows that BayMuDA discovers at least 85%/73% of nodes/links in ~90% of the cases. Our Internet-wide measurement results indicate that BayMuDA can discover millions of Internet nodes and links obscured by the state-of-the-art MDA algorithm, D-Miner, due to uneven responses.
items.abstract_zh: 多路径检测算法（MDA）被提出来发现存在负载平衡（LB）的互联网拓扑。现有方法假设负载均衡响应（LBR）的一致性，即来自 LB 路由器后继路由器的响应。然而，我们发现只有 20% 的案例在互联网上表现出一致性。这一发现极大地挑战了使用当前 MDA 发现的互联网拓扑的完整性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的系统 BayMuDA，它可以估计 LBR 分布并计算统计发现给定跳内的所有节点和链路所需的最小探测数量。对受控拓扑的验证表明，BayMuDA 在约 90% 的情况下发现至少 85%/73% 的节点/链路。我们的全互联网测量结果表明，BayMuDA 可以发现数百万个被最先进的 MDA 算法 D-Miner 由于响应不均匀而掩盖的互联网节点和链路。

items.title: ByteTracker: An Agentless and Real-time Path-aware Network Probing System.
items.abstract: As the number of data center servers grows into the millions and due to the demand for more accurate, rapid and powerful network fault detection and location, the existing Pingmesh-centric monitoring and diagnostic system is not efficient enough. In this paper, we propose ByteTracker, the first agentless probing and diagnostic system for large-scale data center networks. It does not need to deploy probe processes or make any configurations on end hosts, and all probes are launched by a small number of centralized Probers. ByteTracker achieves accurate, real-time probe path tracking with packet mirroring on switches. By reducing end-host probe noise, precisely identifying network timeout probes, accurately tracking probe paths, and marking the failed switch with multiple network timeout probes, ByteTracker can locate network failures with nearly 100% accuracy. We have deployed ByteTracker in all of our data centers for over half a year. During deployment, ByteTracker can detect almost all network anomalies and locate them within 5 seconds with 100% accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 随着数据中心服务器数量增长到数百万台，以及对更准确、更快速、更强大的网络故障检测和定位的需求，现有以Pingmesh为中心的监控和诊断系统已经不够高效。在本文中，我们提出了 ByteTracker，这是第一个用于大规模数据中心网络的无代理探测和诊断系统。它不需要在终端主机上部署探测进程或进行任何配置，所有探测均由少数集中式探测器发起。 ByteTracker 通过交换机上的数据包镜像实现准确、实时的探测路径跟踪。通过降低终端主机探测噪声、精确识别网络超时探测、准确跟踪探测路径以及使用多个网络超时探测标记故障交换机，ByteTracker 可以近 100% 的准确度定位网络故障。我们在所有数据中心部署 ByteTracker 已有半年多的时间。在部署过程中，ByteTracker可以检测几乎所有网络异常并在5秒内定位，准确率100%。

items.title: Formalizing Dependence of Web Infrastructure.
items.abstract: Over the past decade, Internet centralization and its implications for privacy, resilience, and innovation have become a topic of active debate. While the networking community informally agrees on the definition of centralization, we lack a formal metric for quantifying it, which has limited in-depth analysis. In this work, we introduce a rigorous statistical metric for Internet centralization. In doing so, we also uncover how regionalization—geopolitical dependence on the Internet—fundamentally affects centralization. We argue that centralization and regionalization are intertwined forms of dependence that both affect the lived experiences of users and should be jointly studied. We develop a suite of statistical tools, which we use to better understand dependence across three layers of web infrastructure—hosting providers, DNS infrastructure, certificate authorities—in 150 countries. We hope that this statistical toolkit can serve as the foundation for future analysis of Internet behavior.
items.abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，互联网集中化及其对隐私、弹性和创新的影响已成为人们热议的话题。虽然网络社区非正式地同意集中化的定义，但我们缺乏量化它的正式指标，这限制了深入分析。在这项工作中，我们引入了严格的互联网集中化统计指标。在此过程中，我们还揭示了区域化（地缘政治对互联网的依赖）如何从根本上影响集中化。我们认为，集中化和区域化是相互交织的依赖形式，两者都会影响用户的生活体验，应该共同研究。我们开发了一套统计工具，用于更好地了解 150 个国家/地区的三层网络基础设施（托管提供商、DNS 基础设施、证书颁发机构）之间的依赖关系。我们希望这个统计工具包可以作为未来分析互联网行为的基础。

items.title: Network Support For Scalable And High Performance Cloud Exchanges.
items.abstract: Financial exchanges are migrating to the public cloud, but the best-effort nature of the cloud fabric is at odds with the stringent networking requirements of the exchanges. We present Onyx, a system for meeting such requirements which uses many well-studied techniques in a new context as well as introduces new techniques that enable a scalable cloud financial exchange. An overlay multicast tree is used to disseminate data to 1000 participants with ≤ 1 μs difference in data reception time between any two participants, crucial for maintaining fair competition. Several techniques for mitigating latency variance are introduced. Onyx also presents a scheduling policy for trade orders that enhances an exchange's performance and gracefully services bursty traffic. Onyx achieves ≈50% lower latency than the AWS multicast service [1]. Onyx outperforms an existing system, CloudEx [2] in terms of supported number of participants, exchange's throughput and multicast latency. Onyx's techniques can be applied to other existing systems (e.g., DBO) to enhance their performance.
items.abstract_zh: 金融交易所正在迁移到公共云，但云结构的尽力而为的性质与交易所严格的网络要求不一致。我们推出了 Onyx，这是一个满足此类要求的系统，它在新的环境中使用了许多经过充分研究的技术，并引入了支持可扩展云金融交易的新技术。覆盖组播树用于向 1000 个参与者传播数据，任意两个参与者之间的数据接收时间差异≤ 1 μs，这对于维持公平竞争至关重要。介绍了几种减轻延迟差异的技术。 Onyx 还提出了交易订单调度策略，可增强交易所的性能并妥善处理突发流量。 Onyx 的延迟比 AWS 多播服务低约 50% [1]。 Onyx 在支持的参与者数量、交换吞吐量和多播延迟方面优于现有系统 CloudEx [2]。 Onyx 的技术可以应用于其他现有系统（例如 DBO）以增强其性能。

items.title: ACE: Sending Burstiness Control for High-Quality Real-time Communication.
items.abstract: Modern real-time communication (RTC) demands both ultra-low latency and consistently high visual quality. Yet, as content becomes more dynamic and RTTs shrink, we reveal a previously overlooked problem: long-tail queuing latency in the sender's pacing queue between encoder and network. This phenomenon is rooted in a mismatch between the bursty frame stream produced by the encoder and the smooth traffic expected by the network. Existing approaches trying to smoothen the bitrate inevitably force an undesirable trade-off between latency and video quality. To address this, we propose a dual-control approach that manages both the encoding and transmission burstiness. At the sender, we dynamically adjust the bucket size of a token-based pacer to control burstiness at the granularity of frame level. Within the encoder, we introduce an adaptive complexity mechanism that smoothens frame sizes without sacrificing quality. Trace-driven emulation and real-world experiments show our solution ACE reduces end-to-end 95th percentile latency by up to 43% while maintaining superior visual quality versus the state of the art.
items.abstract_zh: 现代实时通信 (RTC) 需要超低延迟和始终如一的高视觉质量。然而，随着内容变得更加动态和 RTT 缩小，我们揭示了一个以前被忽视的问题：编码器和网络之间的发送者调步队列中的长尾排队延迟。这种现象的根源在于编码器产生的突发帧流与网络期望的平滑流量之间的不匹配。试图平滑比特率的现有方法不可避免地会在延迟和视频质量之间进行不必要的权衡。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种管理编码和传输突发性的双重控制方法。在发送方，我们动态调整基于令牌的定步器的桶大小，以在帧级别的粒度上控制突发性。在编码器中，我们引入了一种自适应复杂性机制，可以在不牺牲质量的情况下平滑帧大小。跟踪驱动的仿真和真实世界的实验表明，我们的解决方案 ACE 将端到端 95% 的延迟降低了高达 43%，同时保持了与现有技术相比卓越的视觉质量。

items.title: Towards User-level QoE: Large-scale Practice in Personalized Optimization of Adaptive Video Streaming.
items.abstract: Traditional optimization methods based on system-wide Quality of Service (QoS) metrics have approached their performance limitations in modern large-scale streaming systems. However, aligning user-level Quality of Experience (QoE) with algorithmic optimization objectives remains an unresolved challenge. Therefore, we propose LingXi, the first large-scale deployed system for personalized adaptive video streaming based on user-level experience. LingXi dynamically optimizes the objectives of adaptive video streaming algorithms by analyzing user engagement. Utilizing exit rate as a key metric, we investigate the correlation between QoS indicators and exit rates based on production environment logs, subsequently developing a personalized exit rate predictor. Through Monte Carlo sampling and online Bayesian optimization, we iteratively determine optimal parameters. Large-scale A/B testing utilizing 8% of traffic on Kuaishou, one of the largest short video platforms, demonstrates LingXi's superior performance. LingXi achieves a 0.15% increase in total viewing time, a 0.1% improvement in bitrate, and a 1.3% reduction in stall time across all users, with particularly significant improvements for low-bandwidth users who experience a 15% reduction in stall time.
items.abstract_zh: 基于系统范围服务质量 (QoS) 指标的传统优化方法在现代大规模流媒体系统中已接近性能极限。然而，将用户级体验质量 (QoE) 与算法优化目标保持一致仍然是一个尚未解决的挑战。因此，我们提出了LingXi，第一个大规模部署的基于用户体验的个性化自适应视频流系统。 LingXi 通过分析用户参与度动态优化自适应视频流算法的目标。利用退出率作为关键指标，我们根据生产环境日志研究 QoS 指标和退出率之间的相关性，随后开发个性化的退出率预测器。通过蒙特卡洛采样和在线贝叶斯优化，我们迭代确定最佳参数。在最大的短视频平台之一的快手上利用8%的流量进行的大规模A/B测试，展示了灵犀的优越性能。 LingXi 使所有用户的总观看时间增加了 0.15%，比特率提高了 0.1%，卡顿时间减少了 1.3%，尤其是低带宽用户的改善尤为显着，卡顿时间减少了 15%。

items.title: Orderlock: A New Type of Deadlock and its Implications on High Performance Network Protocol Design.
items.abstract: In the pursuit of designing high-performance network (HPN) protocols, three critical features for effective transmission have been extensively studied: In-order Delivery, Lossless Transmission, and Out-of-order Capability. However, no practical implementation has successfully achieved all three simultaneously. We identify and prove that the simultaneous realization of these features constitutes a necessary and sufficient condition for a new type of deadlock, which we term Orderlock. We demonstrate that operating in an Orderlock-risky network is impractical and conduct a comprehensive exploration and comparison of Orderlock-free protocols, through a case study tuning AI workload performance. From an Orderlock-prevention perspective, our findings provide insights into the requirements for future HPN protocol and hardware designs.
items.abstract_zh: 在设计高性能网络 (HPN) 协议的过程中，有效传输的三个关键特性得到了广泛研究：按序传送、无损传输和乱序能力。然而，还没有任何实际实施能够同时成功实现这三个目标。我们确定并证明了这些功能的同时实现构成了一种新型死锁的充分必要条件，我们将其称为订单锁。我们证明在有 Orderlock 风险的网络中运行是不切实际的，并通过调整 AI 工作负载性能的案例研究对无 Orderlock 协议进行了全面的探索和比较。从订单锁定预防的角度来看，我们的研究结果为未来 HPN 协议和硬件设计的要求提供了见解。

items.title: AoRA: AI-on-RAN for Backhaul-free Edge Inference.
items.abstract: In cellular networks, edge intelligence is often enabled by MultiAccess Edge Computing (MEC), which aims to bring AI services closer to end users. Although MEC reduces latency by placing computation near the network edge, it remains external to the Radio Access Network (RAN) and its native execution environment, thereby introducing additional transport and buffering delays. The emerging AI-on-RAN paradigm proposes to overcome these limitations but remains largely conceptual, lacking practical implementation and feasibility validation. In this paper, we present AoRA, the first framework realizing the AI-on-RAN vision by dynamically utilizing available computational headroom in GPU- and NPU-accelerated RAN platforms to deliver AI services directly from within the base stations. AoRA leverages containerized AI workloads in the 5G RAN stack to enable inlined and opportunistic AI service provisioning without degrading core telecom operations. The framework is fully compliant with O-RAN interfaces and can operate seamlessly alongside existing edge computing infrastructures. Evaluations show that AoRA reduces transport latency by over 30% compared to MEC and 70% compared to cloud-based setups.
items.abstract_zh: 在蜂窝网络中，边缘智能通常由多路访问边缘计算（MEC）实现，旨在让人工智能服务更接近最终用户。尽管 MEC 通过将计算放置在网络边缘附近来减少延迟，但它仍然位于无线接入网络 (RAN) 及其本机执行环境的外部，从而引入了额外的传输和缓冲延迟。新兴的 AI-on-RAN 范式旨在克服这些限制，但主要仍处于概念性阶段，缺乏实际实施和可行性验证。在本文中，我们提出了 AoRA，这是第一个实现 AI-on-RAN 愿景的框架，通过动态利用 GPU 和 NPU 加速的 RAN 平台中的可用计算空间，直接从基站内提供 AI 服务。 AoRA 利用 5G RAN 堆栈中的容器化 AI 工作负载来实现内联和机会性 AI 服务配置，而不会降低核心电信运营的性能。该框架完全符合 O-RAN 接口，可以与现有边缘计算基础设施无缝运行。评估表明，与 MEC 相比，AoRA 的传输延迟降低了 30% 以上，与基于云的设置相比，传输延迟降低了 70%。

items.title: LeoCC: Making Internet Congestion Control Robust to LEO Satellite Dynamics.
items.abstract:
The recent renaissance of low Earth orbit (LEO) satellite networks expands the boundaries of global Internet access, but also introduces substantial new challenges for existing end-to-end congestion control algorithms (CCAs). The rapid and continuous movement of LEO satellites leads to infrastructure-level dynamics, resulting in frequent, LEO-dynamics-induced changes in link capacity, delay, and packet loss rate, which can further mislead the rate control in existing CCAs and cause self-limited performance.

This paper presents LeoCC, a novel CCA that addresses the above challenges and is robust to LEO satellite dynamics. The core idea behind LeoCC lies in a critical characteristic of emerging LEO networks called "connection reconfiguration", which implicitly reflects satellite path changes and is strongly correlated to network variations. Specifically, LeoCC employs a suite of new techniques to: (i) efficiently detect reconfiguration on the endpoint; (ii) apply a reconfiguration-aware model to characterize and estimate network conditions accurately; and (iii) precisely regulate the sending rate. We implement LeoCC in Linux kernel and evaluate its performance through extensive experiments conducted in both real LEO networks and a controlled lab environment. The results show that LeoCC can achieve the best throughput-delay balance under various LEO network conditions as compared to other existing CCAs: it achieves 85~494% higher throughput than Cubic, Copa, BBRv3, and accomplishes 44~56% lower delay than BBRv1 and VIVACE.
items.abstract_zh:
最近近地轨道（LEO）卫星网络的复兴扩大了全球互联网接入的边界，但也给现有的端到端拥塞控制算法（CCA）带来了巨大的新挑战。 LEO卫星的快速连续运动会导致基础设施级的动态变化，导致低地球轨道动态引起的链路容量、延迟和丢包率频繁变化，这可能会进一步误导现有CCA中的速率控制并导致性能自限。

本文提出了 LeoCC，这是一种新颖的 CCA，可以解决上述挑战，并且对 LEO 卫星动力学具有鲁棒性。 LeoCC背后的核心思想在于新兴LEO网络的一个关键特征，即“连接重新配置”，它隐式地反映了卫星路径的变化，并且与网络变化密切相关。具体来说，LeoCC 采用了一套新技术来： (i) 有效地检测端点上的重新配置； (ii) 应用重新配置感知模型来准确描述和估计网络状况； (iii) 精准调控发送速率。我们在 Linux 内核中实现 LeoCC，并通过在真实的 LEO 网络和受控实验室环境中进行的大量实验来评估其性能。结果表明，与现有的其他CCA相比，LeoCC在各种LEO网络条件下都能实现最佳的吞吐量-延迟平衡：比Cubic、Copa、BBRv3实现高85~494%的吞吐量，比BBRv1和VIVACE降低44~56%的延迟。

items.title: Carbon- and Precedence-Aware Scheduling for Data Processing Clusters.
items.abstract: As large-scale data processing workloads continue to grow, their carbon footprint raises concerns. Prior research on carbon-aware schedulers has focused on shifting computation to align with the availability of low-carbon energy, but these approaches assume that each task can be executed independently. In contrast, data processing jobs have precedence constraints that complicate decisions, since delaying an upstream "bottleneck" task to a low-carbon period also blocks downstream tasks, impacting makespan. In this paper, we show that carbon-aware scheduling for data processing benefits from knowledge of both time-varying carbon and precedence constraints. Our main contribution is PCAPS, a carbon-aware scheduler that builds on state-of-the-art scoring or probability-based techniques - in doing so, it explicitly relates the structural importance of each task against the time-varying characteristics of carbon intensity. To illustrate gains due to fine-grained task-level scheduling, we also study CAP, a wrapper for any carbon-agnostic scheduler that generalizes the provisioning ideas of PCAPS. Both techniques allow a user-configurable priority between carbon and makespan, and we give basic analytic results to relate the trade-off between these objectives. Our prototype on a 100-node Kubernetes cluster shows that a moderate configuration of PCAPS reduces carbon footprint by up to 32.9% without significantly impacting total efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 随着大规模数据处理工作负载的持续增长，其碳足迹引起了人们的担忧。先前对碳感知调度程序的研究重点是转移计算以适应低碳能源的可用性，但这些方法假设每个任务都可以独立执行。相比之下，数据处理作业具有优先级限制，使决策变得复杂，因为将上游“瓶颈”任务推迟到低碳时期也会阻碍下游任务，影响完工时间。在本文中，我们表明数据处理的碳感知调度受益于时变碳和优先约束的知识。我们的主要贡献是 PCAPS，这是一种碳感知调度程序，它建立在最先进的评分或基于概率的技术之上 - 在此过程中，它明确地将每个任务的结构重要性与碳强度的时变特征联系起来。为了说明细粒度任务级调度带来的收益，我们还研究了 CAP，它是任何与碳无关的调度程序的包装器，概括了 PCAPS 的配置思想。这两种技术都允许用户在碳和完工时间之间配置优先级，并且我们提供基本的分析结果来关联这些目标之间的权衡。我们在 100 节点 Kubernetes 集群上的原型表明，适度的 PCAPS 配置可减少高达 32.9% 的碳足迹，而不会显着影响总效率。

items.title: Software-based Live Migration for RDMA.
items.abstract: Live migration is critical to ensure services are not interrupted during host maintenance in data centers. On the other hand, RDMA has been widely adopted in data centers, and has attracted both academia and industry for years. However, live migration of RDMA is not supported in today's data centers. Although modifying RDMA NICs (RNICs) to be aware of live migration has been proposed for years, there is no sign of supporting it on commodity RNICs. This paper proposes MigrRDMA, a software-based RDMA live migration that does not rely on any extra hardware support. MigrRDMA provides a software indirection layer to achieve transparent switching to new RDMA communications. Unlike previous RDMA virtualization that provides sharing and isolation, MigrRDMA's indirection layer focuses on keeping the RDMA states on the migration source and destination identical from the perspective of applications. We implemented MigrRDMA prototype over Mellanox RNICs. Our evaluation shows that MigrRDMA adds little downtime when migrating a container with live RDMA connections running at line rate. Besides, the MigrRDMA virtualization layer only adds 3% ~ 9% extra overheads in the data path. When migrating Hadoop tasks, MigrRDMA only incurs an extra 3-second job completion time.
items.abstract_zh: 热迁移对于保证数据中心主机维护期间业务不中断至关重要。另一方面，RDMA已在数据中心广泛采用，多年来吸引了学术界和工业界的关注。然而，当今的数据中心不支持 RDMA 的实时迁移。尽管修改 RDMA NIC (RNIC) 以支持实时迁移的建议已存在多年，但没有迹象表明在商用 RNIC 上支持它。本文提出了MigrRDMA，一种基于软件的RDMA实时迁移，不依赖任何额外的硬件支持。 MigrRDMA 提供软件间接层以实现到新 RDMA 通信的透明切换。与之前提供共享和隔离的 RDMA 虚拟化不同，MigrRDMA 的间接层侧重于从应用程序的角度保持迁移源和目标上的 RDMA 状态相同。我们在 Mellanox RNIC 上实现了 MigrRDMA 原型。我们的评估表明，当迁移具有线速运行的实时 RDMA 连接的容器时，MigrRDMA 几乎不会增加停机时间。此外，MigrRDMA虚拟化层仅在数据路径中增加3%~9%的额外开销。迁移 Hadoop 任务时，MigrRDMA 仅额外增加 3 秒的作业完成时间。

items.title: Small-scale LEO Satellite Networking for Global-scale Demands.
items.abstract: Do we really need 10,000s of Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellites to meet huge global Internet demands? While proven feasible and valuable, such LEO mega-constellation networks have raised concerns about their prohibitive capital expenditures, market monopoly, and unsustainable use of space. Instead, our analysis reveals that most of their satellites can be wasted due to their mismatch with physically uneven demands. We thus propose TinyLEO, a software-defined solution to shrink LEO network size for enormous global demands via dynamic spatiotemporal supply-demand matching. TinyLEO sparsifies satellite supplies on demand by combining diverse yet sparse orbits, hides complexities of this sparse LEO network via orbital model predictive control, and shifts the responsibility for handling these complexities to its geographic segment anycast for higher network usability, lower resource wastes, faster failovers, simpler satellites, and more flexible network orchestration. We have prototyped TinyLEO as a community toolkit for open research. Our evaluation using this toolkit shows that TinyLEO can compress the existing LEO mega-constellation network size by 2.0–7.9×, cut control plane costs by 1–3 orders of magnitude, and maintain the same demands and comparable data plane performance.
items.abstract_zh: 我们真的需要数万颗低地球轨道 (LEO) 卫星来满足巨大的全球互联网需求吗？虽然被证明是可行且有价值的，但这种近地轨道巨型星座网络引起了人们对其高昂的资本支出、市场垄断和不可持续的空间利用的担忧。相反，我们的分析表明，他们的大部分卫星可能由于与物理不均匀需求不匹配而被浪费。因此，我们提出了 TinyLEO，一种软件定义的解决方案，通过动态时空供需匹配来缩小 LEO 网络规模，以满足巨大的全球需求。 TinyLEO 通过组合不同但稀疏的轨道来按需稀疏卫星供应，通过轨道模型预测控制隐藏这种稀疏 LEO 网络的复杂性，并将处理这些复杂性的责任转移到其地理分段选播，以实现更高的网络可用性、更低的资源浪费、更快的故障转移、更简单的卫星和更灵活的网络编排。我们将 TinyLEO 原型化为开放研究的社区工具包。我们使用该工具包进行的评估表明，TinyLEO 可以将现有 LEO 巨型星座网络规模压缩 2.0-7.9 倍，将控制平面成本降低 1-3 个数量级，并保持相同的需求和可比较的数据平面性能。

items.title: Understanding and Profiling CXL.mem Using PathFinder.
items.abstract:
CXL.mem and the resulting memory pool are promising and gaining great attention. Unlike local memory, CXL DIMMs stay at the I/O subsystem, whose inferior performance can easily impact the processor pipeline and memory subsystem, yielding performance interference, hardware contention, obscure behaviors, and underutilized communication and computing resources. However, our community lacks a tool to understand and profile the CXL.mem protocol execution end-to-end between CPU and remote DIMM.

This paper fills the gap by designing and implementing PathFinder 1 , a systematic, informative, and lightweight CXL.mem profiler. PathFinder leverages the capabilities of existing hardware performance monitors (PMUs) and dissects the CXL.mem protocol at adequate granularities. Our key idea is to view the server processor and its chipset as a multi-stage Clos network, equip each architectural module with a PMU-based telemetry engine, track different CXL.mem paths, and apply conventional traffic analysis techniques. PathFinder performs snapshot-based path-driven profiling and introduces four techniques, i.e., path construction, stall cycle breakdown, interference analyzer, and cross-snapshot analysis. We build PathFinder atop Linux Perf and apply it to seven case studies.
items.abstract_zh:
CXL.mem 和由此产生的内存池很有前景并受到广泛关注。与本地内存不同，CXL DIMM 位于 I/O 子系统，其较差的性能很容易影响处理器管道和内存子系统，从而产生性能干扰、硬件争用、模糊行为以及未充分利用的通信和计算资源。然而，我们的社区缺乏一种工具来理解和分析 CPU 和远程 DIMM 之间端到端的 CXL.mem 协议执行。

本文通过设计和实现 PathFinder 1 填补了这一空白，PathFinder 1 是一个系统性、信息丰富且轻量级的 CXL.mem 分析器。 PathFinder 利用现有硬件性能监视器 (PMU) 的功能，并以足够的粒度剖析 CXL.mem 协议。我们的关键思想是将服务器处理器及其芯片组视为多级 Clos 网络，为每个架构模块配备基于 PMU 的遥测引擎，跟踪不同的 CXL.mem 路径，并应用传统的流量分析技术。 PathFinder 执行基于快照的路径驱动分析，并引入了四种技术，即路径构建、失速周期分解、干扰分析器和交叉快照分析。我们在 Linux Perf 之上构建 PathFinder 并将其应用于七个案例研究。

items.title: TLadder: QoE-Centric Video Ladder Optimization with Playback Feedback at Billion Scale.
items.abstract:
We operate one of the largest short video streaming platforms in the world, serving billions of global users every day. Similar to other platforms, we employ Adaptive Bitrate (ABR) streaming, which adaptively selects an appropriate representation from a group of video representations forming a bitrate ladder. In this paper, instead of developing yet another ABR algorithm, we optimize the bitrate ladder configuration, which constitutes the decision space of ABR, by developing a system called TLadder.

TLadder explicitly maximizes the quality-of-experience (QoE) that a ladder is expected to incur, through a principled optimization framework with polynomial complexity and provable optimality. TLadder's optimization jointly considers the video content dimension ( i.e. , the bitrate-quality tradeoff of candidate representations) and the playback feedback dimension ( e.g. , network condition, rebuffering time, and playback bitrate). TLadder also introduces a high-fidelity simulator that provides the optimizer with accurate QoE estimation. We evaluate TLadder via a large-scale A/B test across 0.24 billion users. TLadder achieves a 6.2–20 % reduction in rebuffering time, a 2.7–3.5 unit increase in visual quality (in an 85–100 unit range), and a 1–4 % reduction in CDN traffic cost, compared to our previous bitrate laddering approach. It also outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches based on extensive trace-driven simulation.
items.abstract_zh:
我们运营着全球最大的短视频流媒体平台之一，每天为全球数十亿用户提供服务。与其他平台类似，我们采用自适应比特率（ABR）流媒体，它自适应地从形成比特率阶梯的一组视频表示中选择适当的表示。在本文中，我们没有开发另一种 ABR 算法，而是通过开发一个名为 TLadder 的系统来优化构成 ABR 决策空间的比特率阶梯配置。

TLadder 通过具有多项式复杂度和可证明最优性的原则性优化框架，明确最大化梯子预期产生的体验质量 (QoE)。 TLadder的优化联合考虑了视频内容维度（即候选表示的比特率质量权衡）和播放反馈维度（例如网络状况、重新缓冲时间和播放比特率）。 TLadder 还引入了高保真模拟器，为优化器提供准确的 QoE 估计。我们通过对 2.4 亿用户进行大规模 A/B 测试来评估 TLadder。与我们之前的比特率阶梯方法相比，TLadder 的重新缓冲时间减少了 6.2-20%，视觉质量提高了 2.7-3.5 个单位（在 85-100 个单位范围内），CDN 流量成本降低了 1-4%。它还优于基于广泛跟踪驱动模拟的现有最先进方法。

items.title: Revisiting RDMA Reliability for Lossy Fabrics.
items.abstract: Due to the high operational complexity and limited deployment scale of lossless RDMA networks, the community has been exploring efficient RDMA communication over lossy fabrics. State-of-the-art (SOTA) lossy RDMA solutions implement a simplified selective repeat mechanism in RDMA NICs (RNICs) to enhance loss recovery efficiency. However, these solutions still face performance challenges, such as unavoidable ECMP hash collisions and excessive retransmission timeouts (RTOs). In this paper, we revisit RDMA reliability with the goals of being independent of PFC, compatible with packet-level load balancing, free from RTO, and friendly to hardware offloading. To this end, we propose DCP, a transport architecture that co-designs both the switch and RNICs, fully meeting the design goals. At its core, DCP-Switch introduces a simple yet effective lossless control plane, which is leveraged by DCP-RNIC to enhance reliability support for high-speed lossy fabrics, primarily including header-only-based retransmission and bitmap-free packet tracking. We prototype DCP-Switch using P4 switch and DCP-RNIC using FPGA. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DCP achieves 1.6× and 2.1× performance improvements, compared to SOTA lossless and lossy RDMA solutions, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 由于无损 RDMA 网络的高操作复杂性和有限的部署规模，社区一直在探索有损结构上的高效 RDMA 通信。最先进的 (SOTA) 有损 RDMA 解决方案在 RDMA NIC (RNIC) 中实施简化的选择性重复机制，以提高丢失恢复效率。然而，这些解决方案仍然面临性能挑战，例如不可避免的 ECMP 哈希冲突和过多的重传超时 (RTO)。在本文中，我们重新审视 RDMA 可靠性，目标是独立于 PFC、兼容数据包级负载均衡、不受 RTO 影响、对硬件卸载友好。为此，我们提出了DCP，一种将交换机和RNIC共同设计的传输架构，完全满足设计目标。 DCP-Switch 的核心是引入了一个简单而有效的无损控制平面，DCP-RNIC 利用该控制平面来增强对高速有损结构的可靠性支持，主要包括基于标头的重传和无位图数据包跟踪。我们使用 P4 交换机对 DCP-Switch 进行原型设计，并使用 FPGA 对 DCP-RNIC 进行原型设计。大量实验表明，与 SOTA 无损和有损 RDMA 解决方案相比，DCP 分别实现了 1.6 倍和 2.1 倍的性能提升。

items.title: CClinguist: An Expert-Free Framework for Future-Compatible Congestion Control Algorithm Identification.
items.abstract:
Congestion control algorithms (CCAs) play a critical role in determining transmission quality. With their rapid evolution during the past few decades, understanding the CCA landscape on the Internet has become increasingly essential for network advancement. Traditional CCA census tools, however, rely heavily on manual configuration and construction, necessitating significant human effort to keep pace with the introduction of new CCAs.

In this paper, we introduce the CClinguist framework, which is an expert-free CCA identification tool. It mainly comprises a network profile auto-generator and a self-learning classifier to accommodate emerging CCAs and new network scenarios, ensuring future compatibility in both the temporal and spatial aspects of the network census. We also develop a prototype of CClinguist and evaluate its performance. The results demonstrate that CClingusit can accurately identify 12 known CCAs in the Linux kernel with 97.33% accuracy. Notably, it maintains high accuracy with new scenarios and emerging CCAs, including learning-based and ECN-based CCAs, outperforming state-of-the-art identification tools. When applied to a census of over 7,000 web servers, CClinguist successfully detects unknown CCA variants and is able to explore the support of ECN on web servers.
items.abstract_zh:
拥塞控制算法 (CCA) 在确定传输质量方面发挥着关键作用。随着过去几十年的快速发展，了解互联网上的 CCA 格局对于网络发展变得越来越重要。然而，传统的 CCA 普查工具严重依赖手动配置和构建，需要大量人力才能跟上新 CCA 的引入。

在本文中，我们介绍了CClinguist框架，它是一个无需专家的CCA识别工具。它主要包括网络概况自动生成器和自学习分类器，以适应新兴的CCA和新的网络场景，确保未来网络普查在时间和空间方面的兼容性。我们还开发了 CClinguist 原型并评估其性能。结果表明，CClingusit 可以准确识别 Linux 内核中的 12 个已知 CCA，准确率高达 97.33%。值得注意的是，它在新场景和新兴 CCA 中保持了高精度，包括基于学习和基于 ECN 的 CCA，其性能优于最先进的识别工具。当应用于对 7,000 多个 Web 服务器的普查时，CClinguist 成功检测到未知的 CCA 变体，并能够探索 ECN 在 Web 服务器上的支持。

items.title: Nezha: SmartNIC-based Virtual Switch Load Sharing.
items.abstract: Cloud providers use SmartNIC-accelerated virtual switches (vSwitches) to offer rich network functions (NFs) for tenant VMs. Constrained by limited SmartNIC resources, it is a challenge to provide sufficient network performance for high-demand VMs. Meanwhile, we observed a significant number of idle vSwitches in the data center, which led us to consider leveraging them to build a remote resource pool for high-demand virtual NICs (vNICs). In this work, we propose Nezha, a distributed vSwitch load sharing system. Nezha reuses the existing idle SmartNICs to handle the excess load from the local SmartNIC without adding new devices. Nezha offloads stateless rule/flow tables to the remote, while keeping states locally. This eliminates the need for state synchronization, facilitating load sharing and failover. The deployment cost of Nezha is only a small fraction of that required to deploy new devices. Data collected from production show that our CPS capability bottleneck has shifted from the vSwitch to the VM kernel stack, with #concurrent flows and #vNICs increased by up to 50.4x and 40x, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 云提供商使用 SmartNIC 加速的虚拟交换机 (vSwitches) 为租户虚拟机提供丰富的网络功能 (NF)。受SmartNIC资源有限的限制，为高需求的虚拟机提供足够的网络性能是一个挑战。同时，我们观察到数据中心内有大量闲置的 vSwitch，这促使我们考虑利用它们为高需求的虚拟 NIC (vNIC) 构建远程资源池。在这项工作中，我们提出了 Nezha，一种分布式 vSwitch 负载共享系统。哪吒复用现有闲置的SmartNIC来处理本地SmartNIC的过量负载，而无需添加新设备。 Nezha 将无状态规则/流表卸载到远程，同时在本地保留状态。这消除了状态同步的需要，从而促进负载共享和故障转移。哪吒的部署成本只是部署新设备所需成本的一小部分。从生产中收集的数据表明，我们的 CPS 能力瓶颈已从 vSwitch 转移到 VM 内核堆栈，#concurrent 流和 #vNIC 分别增加了 50.4 倍和 40 倍。

items.title: MixNet: A Runtime Reconfigurable Optical-Electrical Fabric for Distributed Mixture-of-Experts Training.
items.abstract: Mixture-of-Expert (MoE) models outperform conventional models by selectively activating different subnets, named experts , on a per-token basis. This gated computation generates dynamic communications that cannot be determined beforehand, challenging the existing GPU interconnects that remain static during distributed training. In this paper, we advocate for a first-of-its-kind system, called MixNet, that unlocks topology reconfiguration during distributed MoE training. Towards this vision, we first perform a production measurement study and show that the MoE dynamic communication pattern has strong locality , alleviating the need for global reconfiguration. Based on this, we design and implement a regionally reconfigurable high-bandwidth domain that augments existing electrical interconnects using optical circuit switching (OCS), achieving scalability while maintaining rapid adaptability. We build a fully functional MixNet prototype with commodity hardware and a customized collective communication runtime. Our prototype trains state-of-the-art MoE models with in-training topology reconfiguration across 32 A100 GPUs. Large-scale packet-level simulations show that MixNet achieves performance comparable to a non-blocking fat-tree fabric while boosting the networking cost efficiency (e.g., performance per dollar) of four representative MoE models by 1.2×–1.5× and 1.9×–2.3× at 100 Gbps and 400 Gbps link bandwidths, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 专家混合 (MoE) 模型通过基于每个代币有选择地激活不同的子网（称为专家），优于传统模型。这种门控计算会生成无法事先确定的动态通信，对分布式训练期间保持静态的现有 GPU 互连提出了挑战。在本文中，我们提倡创建一种名为 MixNet 的首创系统，该系统可以在分布式 MoE 训练期间解锁拓扑重新配置。为了实现这一愿景，我们首先进行了生产测量研究，并表明 MoE 动态通信模式具有很强的局部性，从而减轻了全局重新配置的需要。基于此，我们设计并实现了一个区域可重构的高带宽域，该域使用光路交换（OCS）增强现有的电气互连，在保持快速适应性的同时实现可扩展性。我们使用商用硬件和定制的集体通信运行时构建了功能齐全的 MixNet 原型。我们的原型通过 32 个 A100 GPU 进行训练中拓扑重新配置来训练最先进的 MoE 模型。大规模数据包级仿真表明，MixNet 实现了与非阻塞胖树结构相当的性能，同时在 100 Gbps 和 400 Gbps 链路带宽下将四个代表性 MoE 模型的网络成本效率（例如，每美元性能）分别提高了 1.2×–1.5× 和 1.9×–2.3×。

items.title: Centralium: A Hybrid Route-Planning Framework for Large-Scale Data Center Network Migrations.
items.abstract: Meta's data center networks have relied on BGP for routing and interconnectivity due to its scalability and simplicity. However, as our network evolves, BGP's limitations in supporting complex network migrations have become apparent. These migrations require customized routing at each intermediate step, considering topological properties. In this paper, we highlight the unique challenges of production migration and illustrate how native BGP falls short, unable to encode both sequential and spatial conditions. To address this challenge, we introduce a novel Route Planning Abstraction (RPA) that augments the BGP protocol to support migration. It enables centralized route planning while maintaining distributed enforcement. We demonstrate the power of this abstraction by developing Centralium, a hybrid route-planning framework with a centralized controller, and over ten use cases to support various migrations in production. Our production experience with Centralium, deployed alongside BGP in large-scale data centers, has shown substantial reduction in the time and risk of network migration operations.
items.abstract_zh: 由于 BGP 的可扩展性和简单性，Meta 的数据中心网络依赖 BGP 进行路由和互连。然而，随着网络的发展，BGP 在支持复杂网络迁移方面的局限性变得越来越明显。这些迁移需要在每个中间步骤定制路由，并考虑拓扑属性。在本文中，我们强调了生产迁移的独特挑战，并说明了原生 BGP 的不足之处，即无法对顺序和空间条件进行编码。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了一种新颖的路由规划抽象 (RPA)，它增强了 BGP 协议以支持迁移。它可以实现集中式路线规划，同时保持分布式执行。我们通过开发 Centralium（带有集中控制器的混合路线规划框架）以及十多个支持生产中各种迁移的用例来展示这种抽象的强大功能。我们在大型数据中心与 BGP 一起部署 Centralium 的生产经验表明，网络迁移操作的时间和风险大幅减少。

items.title: ResCCL: Resource-Efficient Scheduling for Collective Communication.
items.abstract: As distributed deep learning training (DLT) systems scale, collective communication has become a significant performance bottleneck. While current approaches optimize bandwidth utilization and task completion time, existing communication libraries (CCLs) backends fail to efficiently manage GPU resources during algorithm execution, limiting the performance of advanced algorithms. This paper proposes ResCCL , a novel CCL backend designed for Resource-Efficient Scheduling to address key limitations in current systems.
