ResCCL enhances execution efficiency by optimizing scheduling at the primitive level ( e.g. , send and recvReduceCopy), enabling flexible thread block (TB) allocation, and generating lightweight communication kernels to minimize runtime overhead. Our approach tackles the global scheduling problem, reduces idle TB resources, and enhances communication bandwidth. Evaluation results demonstrate that ResCCL achieves up to 2.5× improvement in bandwidth performance compared to both NCCL and MSCCL. It reduces SM resource overhead by 77.8% and increases TB utilization by 41.6% while running the same algorithms. In end-to-end DLT, ResCCL boosts Megatron's throughput by up to 39%.
items.abstract_zh: 随着分布式深度学习训练（DLT）系统的规模扩大，集体通信已成为一个重要的性能瓶颈。虽然当前的方法优化了带宽利用率和任务完成时间，但现有的通信库 (CCL) 后端无法在算法执行期间有效管理 GPU 资源，从而限制了高级算法的性能。本文提出了 ResCCL，这是一种新颖的 CCL 后端，专为资源高效调度而设计，以解决当前系统中的关键限制。 ResCCL 通过优化原语级别的调度（例如 send 和 receiveReduceCopy）、实现灵活的线程块 (TB) 分配以及生成轻量级通信内核以最小化运行时开销来提高执行效率。我们的方法解决了全局调度问题，减少了空闲 TB 资源，并增强了通信带宽。评估结果表明，与 NCCL 和 MSCCL 相比，ResCCL 的带宽性能提高了 2.5 倍。在运行相同算法的情况下，它可以将 SM 资源开销降低 77.8%，并将 TB 利用率提高 41.6%。在端到端 DLT 中，ResCCL 将 Megatron 的吞吐量提高了 39%。

items.title: ByteDance Jakiro: Enabling RDMA and TCP over Virtual Private Cloud.
items.abstract: A Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) that enables both RDMA and TCP provides advantages for both tenants and cloud providers. It serves the flexible demands of RDMA and TCP of tenant applications while delivering a cost-effective solution compared to the construction of two distinct overlay networks. In this study, we introduce Jakiro, an innovative framework of vNIC design that supports both RDMA and TCP within ByteDance Cloud. Jakiro holds the capability to support fundamental VPC features such as QoS, security groups, etc., for both RDMA and TCP streams while maintaining compatibility with applications and intra-host RDMA optimization techniques. We benchmark Jakiro's performance using basic test cases and real-world high-performance computing applications and distributed machine learning training. The results indicate that the RDMA performance of Jakiro is close to that of the physical RDMA. Concurrently, Jakiro guarantees a weighted fair QoS between RDMA and TCP. Jakiro has been deployed in ByteDance Cloud for one year, we share our critical design and deployment decisions, as well as experiences and lessons from production.
items.abstract_zh: 同时支持 RDMA 和 TCP 的虚拟私有云 (VPC) 为租户和云提供商提供了优势。它满足租户应用程序对 RDMA 和 TCP 的灵活需求，同时与构建两个不同的覆盖网络相比，提供经济高效的解决方案。在本研究中，我们介绍了 Jakiro，这是一种创新的 vNIC 设计框架，支持字节跳动云中的 RDMA 和 TCP。 Jakiro 能够支持 RDMA 和 TCP 流的基本 VPC 功能，例如 QoS、安全组等，同时保持与应用程序和主机内 RDMA 优化技术的兼容性。我们使用基本测试用例和现实世界的高性能计算应用程序以及分布式机器学习训练来对 Jakiro 的性能进行基准测试。结果表明，Jakiro 的 RDMA 性能接近物理 RDMA。同时，Jakiro 保证 RDMA 和 TCP 之间的加权公平 QoS。 Jakiro 已经在字节跳动云部署一年了，我们分享我们的关键设计和部署决策，以及生产中的经验和教训。

items.title: Alibaba Stellar: A New Generation RDMA Network for Cloud AI.
items.abstract: The rapid adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) in cloud environments has intensified the demand for high-performance AI training and inference, where Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) plays a critical role. However, existing RDMA virtualization solutions, such as Single-Root Input/Output Virtualization (SR-IOV), face significant limitations in scalability, performance, and stability. These issues include lengthy container initialization times, hardware resource constraints, and inefficient traffic steering. To address these challenges, we propose Stellar, a new generation RDMA network for cloud AI. Stellar introduces three key innovations: Para-Virtualized Direct Memory Access (PVDMA) for on-demand memory pinning, extended Memory Translation Table (eMTT) for optimized GPU Direct RDMA (GDR) performance, and RDMA Packet Spray for efficient multi-path utilization. Deployed in our large-scale AI clusters, Stellar spins up virtual devices in seconds, reduces container initialization time by 15 times, and improves LLM training speed by up to 14%. Our evaluations demonstrate that Stellar significantly outperforms existing solutions, offering a scalable, stable, and high-performance RDMA network for cloud AI.
items.abstract_zh: 云环境中大型语言模型 (LLM) 的快速采用加剧了对高性能人工智能训练和推理的需求，其中远程直接内存访问 (RDMA) 发挥着关键作用。然而，现有的 RDMA 虚拟化解决方案，例如单根输入/输出虚拟化 (SR-IOV)，在可扩展性、性能和稳定性方面面临重大限制。这些问题包括冗长的容器初始化时间、硬件资源限制和低效的流量引导。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Stellar，一种用于云 AI 的新一代 RDMA 网络。 Stellar 推出了三项关键创新：用于按需内存固定的半虚拟化直接内存访问 (PVDMA)、用于优化 GPU 直接 RDMA (GDR) 性能的扩展内存转换表 (eMTT) 以及用于高效多路径利用的 RDMA 数据包喷射。 Stellar部署在我们的大规模AI集群中，可以在几秒钟内启动虚拟设备，将容器初始化时间减少15倍，并将LLM训练速度提高高达14%。我们的评估表明，Stellar 的性能显着优于现有解决方案，为云 AI 提供可扩展、稳定且高性能的 RDMA 网络。

items.title: Albatross: A Containerized Cloud Gateway Platform with FPGA-accelerated Packet-level Load Balancing.
items.abstract: Alibaba Cloud's centralized gateways relied heavily on high-capacity switching ASICs, but the abrupt halt of Tofino chip evolution in Jan 2023 forced us to seek alternatives that can meet the requirements of performance, supply-chain security, code reuse, and resource efficiency. After evaluating multiple options, we developed Albatross , our 3rd gen cloud gateway based on FPGA and x86 CPUs. Albatross delivers FPGA-based packet-level load balancing to the host CPUs to prevent CPU core overload, manages large reorder buffers under high-latency jitters (100μs) during complex cloud service processing, and resolves head-of-line (HOL) blocking from packet losses or software exceptions in CPUs. To avoid being overloaded by heavy hitters due to anomalies or attacks, it also implements a two-stage rate limiter for millions of tenants with only 2MB of FPGA memory. To maximize resource utilization, Albatross uses containerization to host multiple gateway instances and designs a BGP proxy to lessen the BGP peering overhead on uplink switches caused by high-density container deployments. After hundreds of man-months of development, a single Albatross node can process 80~120Mpps of cloud network traffic with an average latency of 20μs, reducing gateway and sandbox infra costs by 50%.
items.abstract_zh: 阿里云的集中式网关严重依赖大容量交换ASIC，但2023年1月Tofino芯片演进的突然停止迫使我们寻找能够满足性能、供应链安全、代码复用和资源效率要求的替代方案。在评估了多个选项后，我们开发了 Albatross，这是我们基于 FPGA 和 x86 CPU 的第三代云网关。 Albatross 为主机 CPU 提供基于 FPGA 的数据包级负载平衡，以防止 CPU 核心过载，在复杂的云服务处理过程中管理高延迟抖动 (100μs) 下的大型重排序缓冲区，并解决由于数据包丢失或 CPU 中软件异常而导致的队头 (HOL) 阻塞。为了避免由于异常或攻击而导致重击者过载，它还为仅 2MB FPGA 内存的数百万租户实现了两级速率限制器。为了最大限度地提高资源利用率，Albatross 使用容器化来托管多个网关实例，并设计 BGP 代理来减少因高密度容器部署而导致的上行链路交换机上的 BGP 对等开销。经过数百人月的开发，单个Albatross节点可以处理80~120Mpps的云网络流量，平均延迟为20μs，将网关和沙箱基础设施成本降低50%。

items.title: Lessons Learned from Operating a Large Network Telescope.
items.abstract: Network telescopes (aka darknets ) collect unsolicited Internet traffic (aka Internet background radiation or IBR ), which includes benign and malicious scanning as well as artifacts of spoofed denial-of-service attacks and misconfigured software and hosts. Analysis of this traffic has revealed macroscopic insights into security-related events and global network dynamics such as outages. Operating a large-scale network telescope is challenging but often taken for granted, more so than in more mature scientific disciplines. We offer the first study documenting our experiences operating the UCSD Network Telescope, the largest and longest-operating network telescope supporting scientific research. We provide background on the history of the telescope, and focus on increasing operational challenges as the underlying network evolves. We develop and apply techniques to leverage third-party scanning activity to validate the integrity of the data, and to discover misconfigurations in the instrumentation. These insights are crucial for understanding measurement results, which we illustrate using concrete examples. We discuss how our findings generalize to support the expanding ecosystem of other passive techniques, such as honeypots, to track security phenomena.
items.abstract_zh: 网络望远镜（又名暗网）收集未经请求的互联网流量（又名互联网背景辐射或 IBR），其中包括良性和恶意扫描以及欺骗性拒绝服务攻击和错误配置的软件和主机。对这些流量的分析揭示了对安全相关事件和全球网络动态（例如中断）的宏观洞察。操作大型网络望远镜具有挑战性，但通常被认为是理所当然的，比在更成熟的科学学科中更是如此。我们提供了第一份研究报告，记录了我们操作加州大学圣地亚哥分校网络望远镜的经验，这是支持科学研究的最大、运行时间最长的网络望远镜。我们提供了望远镜的历史背景，并重点关注随着底层网络的发展而增加的操作挑战。我们开发并应用技术来利用第三方扫描活动来验证数据的完整性，并发现仪器中的错误配置。这些见解对于理解测量结果至关重要，我们使用具体示例进行说明。我们讨论我们的发现如何推广以支持其他被动技术（例如蜜罐）不断扩大的生态系统，以跟踪安全现象。

items.title: Unlocking Superior Performance in Reconfigurable Data Center Networks with Credit-Based Transport.
items.abstract: The large-scale, end-to-end implementation of microsecond-switched reconfigurable data center networks (RDCNs), coupled with innovative routing and topology designs that provide continuous routes abstracting away frequent topology changes, demonstrates promise as a viable alternative to Clos networks in the post-Moore's Law era. However, the gap remains in transport performance, with current transport solutions falling short of unlocking their full performance. In this paper, we introduce Flare, a novel credit-based transport protocol that ensures reliable traffic delivery, low latency, and leverages the rapidly reconfiguring circuits of the RDCN to opportunistically route traffic over short paths, maximizing throughput. In simulations, Flare enables RDCNs to outperform Clos networks, achieving up to 1.15× higher throughput even under adversarial traffic. Additionally, it delivers up to 2× and 1.5× higher throughput than NDP and ExpressPass, and up to 10×, 15×, and 3.5× shorter flow completion time (FCT) than ExpressPass, TDTCP, and Bolt. Our testbed implementation further demonstrates the feasibility of Flare's mechanisms with programmable switches and DPDK.
items.abstract_zh: 微秒交换可重构数据中心网络 (RDCN) 的大规模端到端实施，加上创新的路由和拓扑设计，提供连续路由，消除频繁的拓扑变化，证明了在后摩尔定律时代作为 Clos 网络的可行替代方案的前景。然而，运输性能方面仍然存在差距，当前的运输解决方案未能充分发挥其性能。在本文中，我们介绍了 Flare，一种新型的基于信用的传输协议，可确保可靠的流量传输、低延迟，并利用 RDCN 的快速重新配置电路来机会性地通过短路径路由流量，从而最大化吞吐量。在模拟中，Flare 使 RDCN 的性能优于 Clos 网络，即使在对抗流量下也能实现高达 1.15 倍的吞吐量提升。此外，它的吞吐量比 NDP 和 ExpressPass 高 2 倍和 1.5 倍，并且流完成时间 (FCT) 比 ExpressPass、TDTCP 和 Bolt 短 10 倍、15 倍和 3.5 倍。我们的测试平台实施进一步证明了 Flare 机制与可编程开关和 DPDK 的可行性。

items.title: PreTE: Traffic Engineering with Predictive Failures.
items.abstract: Fiber links in wide-area networks (WANs) are exposed to complicated environments and hence are vulnerable to failures like fiber cuts. The conventional approach of using static probabilistic failures falls short in fiber-cut scenarios because these fiber cuts are rare but disruptive, making it difficult for network operators to balance network utilization and availability in WAN traffic engineering. Our large-scale measurements of per-second optical-layer data reveal that the fiber's failure probability increases by several orders of magnitude when experiencing a rare and ephemeral degradation state. Therefore, we present a novel traffic engineering (TE) system called PreTE to factor in the dynamic fiber cut probabilities directly into TE systems. At the core of the PreTE system, fiber degradation facilitates failure predictions and traffic tunnels to be proactively updated, followed by traffic allocation optimizations among updated tunnels. We evaluate PreTE using a production-level WAN testbed and large-scale simulations. The testbed evaluation quantifies PreTE's runtime to demonstrate the feasibility to implement in large-scale WANs. Our large-scale simulation results show that PreTE can support up to 2× more demand at the same level of availability as compared to existing TE schemes.
items.abstract_zh: 广域网 (WAN) 中的光纤链路暴露在复杂的环境中，因此很容易出现断纤等故障。使用静态概率故障的传统方法在光纤切断场景中存在不足，因为这些光纤切断很少见，但具有破坏性，使得网络运营商很难在 WAN 流量工程中平衡网络利用率和可用性。我们对每秒光层数据的大规模测量表明，当经历罕见且短暂的退化状态时，光纤的故障概率会增加几个数量级。因此，我们提出了一种称为 PreTE 的新型流量工程 (TE) 系统，将动态光纤切断概率直接纳入 TE 系统。作为 PreTE 系统的核心，光纤退化有助于故障预测和主动更新流量隧道，进而优化更新隧道之间的流量分配。我们使用生产级 WAN 测试台和大规模模拟来评估 PreTE。测试台评估量化了 PreTE 的运行时间，以证明在大规模广域网中实施的可行性。我们的大规模仿真结果表明，与现有 TE 方案相比，PreTE 在相同可用性水平下可以支持高达 2 倍的需求。

items.title: Scalable Video Conferencing Using SDN Principles.
items.abstract: Video-conferencing applications face an unwavering surge in traffic, stressing their underlying infrastructure in unprecedented ways. This paper rethinks the key building block for conferencing infrastructures — selective forwarding units (SFUs). SFUs relay and adapt media streams between participants and, today, run in software on general-purpose servers. Our main insight, discerned from dissecting the operation of production SFU servers, is that SFUs largely mimic traditional packet-processing operations such as dropping and forwarding. Guided by this, we present Scallop, an SDN-inspired SFU that decouples video-conferencing applications into a hardware-based data plane for latency-sensitive and frequent media operations, and a software control plane for the (infrequent) remaining tasks, such as analyzing feedback signals and session management. Scallop is a general design that is suitable for a variety of hardware platforms, including programmable switches and SmartNICs. Our Tofino-based implementation fully supports WebRTC and delivers 7-422× improved scaling over a 32-core commodity server, while reaping performance improvements by cutting forwarding-induced latency by 26×. We also present an implementation of Scallop on the BlueField-3 SmartNIC.
items.abstract_zh: 视频会议应用程序面临着流量的持续激增，以前所未有的方式对其底层基础设施造成压力。本文重新思考了会议基础设施的关键构建模块——选择性转发单元 (SFU)。 SFU 在参与者之间中继和调整媒体流，并且如今在通用服务器上的软件中运行。通过剖析生产 SFU 服务器的操作，我们得出的主要见解是，SFU 在很大程度上模仿了传统的数据包处理操作，例如丢弃和转发。在此指导下，我们推出了 Scallop，这是一种受 SDN 启发的 SFU，它将视频会议应用程序解耦到基于硬件的数据平面中，用于对延迟敏感和频繁的媒体操作，以及用于（不频繁的）剩余任务的软件控制平面，例如分析反馈信号和会话管理。 Scallop是一种通用设计，适用于各种硬件平台，包括可编程交换机和SmartNIC。我们基于 Tofino 的实施完全支持 WebRTC，并在 32 核商用服务器上提供 7-422 倍的改进扩展，同时通过将转发引起的延迟减少 26 倍来获得性能改进。我们还展示了 BlueField-3 SmartNIC 上的 Scallop 实现。

items.title: ZENITH: Towards A Formally Verified Highly-Available Control Plane.
items.abstract: Today, large-scale software-defined networks use microservice-based controllers. Bugs in these controllers can reduce network availability by making the data plane state inconsistent with the high-level intent. To recover from such inconsistencies, modern controllers periodically reconcile the state of all the switches with the desired intent. However, periodic reconciliation limits the availability and performance of the network at scale. We introduce Zenith, a microservice-based controller that avoids inconsistencies by design rather than always relying on recovery mechanisms. We have formally verified Zenith's specifications and have proved that it ensures the network state will eventually be consistent with intent. We automatically generate Zenith's code from its specification to minimize the likelihood of errors in the final implementation. Zenith's guarantees and abstractions also enable developers to independently verify SDN applications and ensure end-to-end safety and correctness. Zenith resolves inconsistencies 5× faster than today's designs and significantly improves availability.
items.abstract_zh: 如今，大规模软件定义网络使用基于微服务的控制器。这些控制器中的错误可能会导致数据平面状态与高层意图不一致，从而降低网络可用性。为了从这种不一致中恢复过来，现代控制器会定期调整所有开关的状态与所需的意图。然而，定期协调会限制大规模网络的可用性和性能。我们引入 Zenith，这是一种基于微服务的控制器，它通过设计避免不一致，而不是始终依赖恢复机制。我们已经正式验证了Zenith的规范，并证明它可以确保网络状态最终与意图一致。我们根据 Zenith 的规范自动生成代码，以最大程度地减少最终实现中出现错误的可能性。 Zenith的保证和抽象还使开发人员能够独立验证SDN应用程序并确保端到端的安全性和正确性。 Zenith 解决不一致问题的速度比当今的设计快 5 倍，并显着提高了可用性。

items.title: Firefly: Scalable, Ultra-Accurate Clock Synchronization for Datacenters.
items.abstract: Cloud-based financial exchanges require sub-10 ns device-to-device clock synchronization accuracy while adhering to Coordinated Universal Time (UTC). Existing clock sync techniques struggle to meet this demand at scale and are vulnerable to clock drift, jitter, and path asymmetries. Firefly, a software-driven datacenter clock sync system, scalably, cost-effectively, and reliably achieves very high clock sync accuracy. It employs a distributed consensus algorithm on a random overlay graph to rapidly converge to a common time while applying gradual adjustments to device hardware clocks. To realize consistent sync-to-UTC ( external sync ) across devices while maintaining a stable device-to-device internal sync , Firefly uses a novel technique, layered synchronization , that decouples internal and external syncs. In a 248-machine Clos network, Firefly achieves sub-10 ns device-to-device and ≤1 μ s device-to-UTC sync, and is resilient to time server failure and unstable clocks.
items.abstract_zh: 基于云的金融交易需要低于 10 纳秒的设备到设备时钟同步精度，同时遵守协调世界时 (UTC)。现有的时钟同步技术难以大规模满足这一需求，并且容易受到时钟漂移、抖动和路径不对称的影响。 Firefly 是一种软件驱动的数据中心时钟同步系统，可扩展、经济高效且可靠地实现非常高的时钟同步精度。它在随机覆盖图上采用分布式共识算法，以快速收敛到公共时间，同时对设备硬件时钟进行逐步调整。为了实现跨设备一致的同步到 UTC（外部同步），同时保持稳定的设备间内部同步，Firefly 使用了一种新颖的技术，即分层同步，该技术可解耦内部和外部同步。在 248 台机器的 Clos 网络中，Firefly 实现了低于 10 ns 的设备到设备和 ≤1 μs 的设备到 UTC 同步，并且能够适应时间服务器故障和不稳定的时钟。

items.title: SpliDT: Partitioned Decision Trees for Scalable Stateful Inference at Line Rate.
items.abstract:
Machine learning is increasingly used in programmable data planes, such as switches [4, 12, 13] and smartNICs [1, 16], to enable real-time traffic analysis and security monitoring at line rate. Decision trees (DTs) are particularly well-suited for these tasks due to their interpretability and compatibility with the Reconfigurable Match-Action Table (RMT) architecture. However, current DT implementations require collecting all features upfront, which limits scalability and accuracy due to constrained data plane resources.

This paper introduces SpliDT, a scalable framework that reimagines DT deployment as a partitioned inference problem over a sliding window of packets (Figure 1). By dividing inference into sequential subtrees—each using its own set of top-k features—SpliDT supports more stateful features without exceeding hardware limits. An in-band control channel, implemented via packet recirculation, manages transitions between subtrees and reuses match keys and registers across partitions. This design allows physical resources to be shared efficiently while maintaining line-rate processing.

To maximize accuracy and scalability, SpliDT employs a custom training and design-space-exploration (DSE) workflow that jointly optimizes feature allocation, tree depth, and partitioning. Evaluations show that SpliDT supports up to 5× more features, scales to millions of flows, and outperforms baselines, with low overhead and minimal time-to-detection (TTD).
items.abstract_zh:
机器学习越来越多地用于可编程数据平面，例如交换机 [4, 12, 13] 和 smartNIC [1, 16]，以实现线速的实时流量分析和安全监控。决策树 (DT) 由于其可解释性以及与可重新配置匹配操作表 (RMT) 架构的兼容性，特别适合这些任务。然而，当前的 DT 实现需要预先收集所有特征，由于数据平面资源有限，这限制了可扩展性和准确性。

本文介绍了 SpliDT，这是一个可扩展的框架，它将 DT 部署重新想象为数据包滑动窗口上的分区推理问题（图 1）。通过将推理划分为顺序子树（每个子树使用自己的一组 top-k 特征），SpliDT 支持更多有状态特征，而不会超出硬件限制。通过数据包再循环实现的带内控制通道管理子树之间的转换并跨分区重用匹配密钥和寄存器。这种设计允许有效地共享物理资源，同时保持线速处理。

为了最大限度地提高准确性和可扩展性，SpliDT 采用自定义训练和设计空间探索 (DSE) 工作流程，共同优化特征分配、树深度和分区。评估表明，SpliDT 支持多达 5 倍的功能，可扩展到数百万个流，并且性能优于基线，且开销较低，检测时间 (TTD) 最短。

items.title: Agua: A Concept-Based Explainer for Learning-Enabled Systems.
items.abstract:
While deep learning offers superior performance in systems and networking, adoption is often hindered by difficulties in understanding and debugging. Explainability aims to bridge this gap by providing insight into the model's decisions. However, existing methods primarily identify the most influential input features, forcing operators to perform extensive manual analysis of low-level signals (e.g., buffer t - 1).

In this paper, we introduce Agua, an explainability framework that explains a model's decisions using high-level, human understandable concepts (e.g., "volatile network conditions"). Our concept-based explainability framework lays the foundation for intelligent networked systems, enabling operators to interact with data-driven systems. To explain the controller's outputs using concept-level reasoning, Agua builds a surrogate concept-based model of the controller with two mappings: one from the controller's embeddings to a predefined concept space, and another from the concept space to the controller's output. Through comprehensive evaluations on diverse applications—adaptive bitrate streaming, congestion control, and distributed denial of service detection—we demonstrate Agua's ability to generate robust, high-fidelity (93–99%) explanations, outperforming prior methods. Finally, we demonstrate several practical use cases of Agua in networking environments—debugging unintended behaviors, identifying distribution shifts, devising concept-based strategies for efficient retraining, and augmenting environment-specific datasets.
items.abstract_zh:
虽然深度学习在系统和网络方面提供了卓越的性能，但其采用常常因理解和调试方面的困难而受到阻碍。可解释性旨在通过提供对模型决策的洞察来弥合这一差距。然而，现有方法主要识别最有影响力的输入特征，迫使操作员对低电平信号（例如缓冲区 t - 1）进行广泛的手动分析。

在本文中，我们介绍了 Agua，这是一个可解释性框架，它使用人类可理解的高级概念（例如“不稳定的网络条件”）来解释模型的决策。我们基于概念的可解释性框架为智能网络系统奠定了基础，使操作员能够与数据驱动的系统进行交互。为了使用概念级推理解释控制器的输出，Agua 构建了一个基于代理概念的控制器模型，具有两种映射：一种从控制器的嵌入到预定义的概念空间，另一种从概念空间到控制器的输出。通过对不同应用程序（自适应比特率流、拥塞控制和分布式拒绝服务检测）的综合评估，我们证明了 Agua 生成稳健、高保真 (93-99%) 解释的能力，优于先前的方法。最后，我们展示了 Agua 在网络环境中的几个实际用例——调试意外行为、识别分布变化、设计基于概念的策略以进行有效的再训练，以及增强特定于环境的数据集。

items.title: SGLB: Scalable and Robust Global Load Balancing in Commodity AI Clusters.
items.abstract: Internet companies are constructing large-scale AI clusters with commodity Ethernet switches for AI model training to support their businesses. AI training workloads impose stringent network requirements, mandating that cluster networks deliver high peak throughput while maintaining robustness and resilience in the face of link failures. We present SGLB, a distributed, global congestion-aware load balancing system for AI clusters. SGLB operates a control-plane protocol, SyncMesh, to enable a new load balancing abstraction in modern commodity switches—Global Load Balancing (GLB) engine—which utilizes global congestion information to distribute traffic across all available paths. We address three key challenges in designing SGLB: fast routing convergence to minimize downtime in the event of link failures, scalable maintenance of congestion profiles within the constraints of limited switch hardware resources, and preventing GLB throughput suppression in scenarios where path bandwidths are asymmetric. We prototype SGLB and conduct extensive experiments to evaluate SGLB. SGLB ensures rapid routing convergence in the event of link failures, recovering in as little as 45 μs to guarantee network robustness for long-term, stable model training. Additionally, SGLB effectively load-balances traffic across paths, avoiding those with global congestion, which accelerates All-to-All collective communication by up to 60%.
items.abstract_zh: 互联网公司正在利用商用以太网交换机构建大规模人工智能集群，用于人工智能模型训练以支持其业务。人工智能训练工作负载提出了严格的网络要求，要求集群网络提供高峰值吞吐量，同时在面临链路故障时保持鲁棒性和弹性。我们推出了 SGLB，一种用于 AI 集群的分布式全局拥塞感知负载平衡系统。 SGLB 运行控制平面协议 SyncMesh，以在现代商用交换机中启用新的负载平衡抽象 - 全局负载平衡 (GLB) 引擎 - 该引擎利用全局拥塞信息在所有可用路径上分配流量。我们解决了设计 SGLB 时的三个关键挑战：快速路由收敛以最大限度地减少链路故障时的停机时间、在有限交换机硬件资源的限制下可扩展地维护拥塞配置文件，以及在路径带宽不对称的情况下防止 GLB 吞吐量抑制。我们对 SGLB 进行原型设计并进行大量实验来评估 SGLB。 SGLB保证链路故障时路由快速收敛，最快45μs恢复，保证网络的鲁棒性，实现长期稳定的模型训练。此外，SGLB 有效地对路径间的流量进行负载均衡，避免出现全局拥塞，从而将 All-to-All 集体通信速度提高高达 60%。

items.title: Palladium: A DPU-enabled Multi-Tenant Serverless Cloud over Zero-copy Multi-node RDMA Fabrics.
items.abstract: Serverless computing offers resource efficiency but suffers from a heavyweight data plane. We present Palladium, a DPU-offloaded serverless data plane enabling distributed zero-copy communication. Palladium uses two-sided RDMA and cross-processor shared memory to mitigate limitations of wimpy DPU cores. Its DPU-enabled network engine (DNE) isolates RDMA resources and manages flows across tenants. By converting HTTP/TCP to RDMA at ingress, Palladium reduces protocol overhead on the critical path.
items.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算提供了资源效率，但受到重量级数据平面的影响。我们推出 Palladium，这是一种 DPU 卸载的无服务器数据平面，可实现分布式零拷贝通信。 Palladium 使用两侧 RDMA 和跨处理器共享内存来缓解弱 DPU 内核的限制。其支持 DPU 的网络引擎 (DNE) 可隔离 RDMA 资源并管理跨租户的流量。通过在入口处将 HTTP/TCP 转换为 RDMA，Palladium 减少了关键路径上的协议开销。

items.title: InfiniteHBD: Building Datacenter-Scale High-Bandwidth Domain for LLM with Optical Circuit Switching Transceivers.
items.abstract:
Scaling Large Language Model (LLM) training relies on multidimensional parallelism, where High-Bandwidth Domains (HBDs) are critical for communication-intensive parallelism like Tensor Parallelism. However, existing HBD architectures face fundamental limitations in scalability, cost, and fault resiliency: switch-centric HBDs (e.g., NVL-72) incur prohibitive scaling costs, while GPU-centric HBDs (e.g., TPUv3/Dojo) suffer from severe fault propagation. Switch-GPU hybrid HBDs (e.g., TPUv4) take a middle-ground approach, but the fault explosion radius remains large.

We propose InfiniteHBD , a transceiver-centric HBD architecture that integrates connectivity and dynamic switching at the transceiver level by embedding Optical Circuit Switching (OCS) within each transceiver. It enables reconfigurable point-to-multipoint communication and scalable variable-size ring topologies. InfiniteHBD achieves datacenter-scale scalability without cost explosion, fault isolation at the node level, and full bandwidth utilization for healthy GPUs. Key innovations include a Silicon Photonic-based OCS transceiver ( OCSTrx ), a reconfigurable k-hop ring topology, and an HBD-DCN orchestration algorithm. The evaluation demonstrates that InfiniteHBD reduces cost to 31 % of NVL-72, achieves a near-zero GPU waste ratio (over 10x lower than NVL-72 and TPUv4), maintains near-zero cross-ToR traffic under 7% node fault ratio, and improves Model FLOPs Utilization by 3.37 × compared to NVIDIA DGX (8 GPUs/node).
items.abstract_zh:
扩展大型语言模型 (LLM) 训练依赖于多维并行性，其中高带宽域 (HBD) 对于张量并行性等通信密集型并行性至关重要。然而，现有的 HBD 架构在可扩展性、成本和故障恢复方面面临着根本性的限制：以交换机为中心的 HBD（例如 NVL-72）会产生过高的扩展成本，而以 GPU 为中心的 HBD（例如 TPUv3/Dojo）会遭受严重的故障传播。 Switch-GPU混合HBD（例如TPUv4）采取中间立场，但故障爆炸半径仍然很大。

我们提出了 InfiniteHBD，这是一种以收发器为中心的 HBD 架构，通过在每个收发器中嵌入光路交换 (OCS)，在收发器级别集成连接和动态切换。它支持可重新配置的点对多点通信和可扩展的可变大小环拓扑。 InfiniteHBD 可在不增加成本的情况下实现数据中心规模的可扩展性、节点级别的故障隔离以及健康 GPU 的充分带宽利用。主要创新包括基于硅光子的 OCS 收发器 (OCSTrx)、可重新配置的 k-hop 环形拓扑和 HBD-DCN 编排算法。评估表明，InfiniteHBD 将成本降低至 NVL-72 的 31%，实现近乎零的 GPU 浪费率（比 NVL-72 和 TPUv4 低 10 倍以上），在 7% 的节点故障率下保持近零的跨 ToR 流量，并且与 NVIDIA DGX（8 个 GPU/节点）相比，模型 FLOP 利用率提高了 3.37 倍。

items.title: Falcon: A Reliable, Low Latency Hardware Transport.
items.abstract: Hardware transports such as RoCE deliver high performance with minimal host CPU, but are best suited to special-purpose deployments that limit their use, e.g., backend networks or Ethernet with Priority Flow Control (PFC). We introduce Falcon , the first hardware transport that supports multiple Upper Layer Protocols (ULPs) and heterogeneous application workloads in general-purpose Ethernet datacenter environments (with losses and without special switch support). Key design elements include: delay-based congestion control with multipath load balancing; a layered design with a simple request-response transaction interface for multi-ULP support; hardware-based retransmissions and error-handling for scalability; and a programmable engine for flexibility. The first Falcon hardware implementation delivers a peak performance of 200 Gbps, 120 Mops/sec, with near-optimal operation completion times that are up to 8× lower than CX-7 RoCE under network congestion, and up to 65% higher goodput under lossy conditions.
items.abstract_zh: RoCE 等硬件传输以最少的主机 CPU 提供高性能，但最适合限制其使用的特殊用途部署，例如具有优先级流量控制 (PFC) 的后端网络或以太网。我们推出 Falcon，这是第一个在通用以太网数据中心环境中支持多个上层协议 (ULP) 和异构应用程序工作负载的硬件传输（有损耗且无需特殊交换机支持）。关键设计元素包括：基于延迟的拥塞控制和多路径负载平衡；具有简单请求响应事务接口的分层设计，用于多 ULP 支持；基于硬件的重传和错误处理以实现可扩展性；以及一个具有灵活性的可编程引擎。第一个 Falcon 硬件实现可提供 200 Gbps、120 Mops/秒的峰值性能，在网络拥塞情况下，操作完成时间比 CX-7 RoCE 缩短 8 倍，在有损条件下，吞吐量提高 65%，接近最佳。

items.title: PtCAM: Scalable High-Speed Name Prefix Lookup using TCAM.
items.abstract: Name prefix lookup is a core characteristic of name-based packet forwarding in ICN and also URL redirections in CDN. This operation is essentially a longest prefix match on URL-like names, which faces significant challenges in high-speed processing due to large set, length-unbounded names and per-packet lookup need. In this paper, we propose a scheme to support generic hierarchical name lookups on millions of prefixes with fast, constant and guaranteed performance using ternary content-addressable memory (TCAM). Our work has three contributions. First, a scheme, namely PtCAM, is proposed to exploit TCAM for name lookup using a binary Patricia trie. Second, several approaches are proposed to enhance efficiency and scalability. Third, experiments on various name datasets are carried out. The results show that our scheme has the potential to achieve high-speed lookup performance nearly equal to the given TCAM throughput. Notably, PtCAM can be implemented on TCAM-based IP linecards, which means that industrial commercial off-the-shelf devices can be directly involved in the advancement of information-centric innovation and deployment.
items.abstract_zh: 名称前缀查找是 ICN 中基于名称的数据包转发以及 CDN 中的 URL 重定向的核心特征。该操作本质上是对类似 URL 的名称进行最长前缀匹配，由于名称集大、长度无限制以及逐包查找的需要，该操作在高速处理方面面临着重大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种方案，使用三态内容寻址存储器（TCAM）支持对数百万个前缀进行通用分层名称查找，并具有快速、恒定和有保证的性能。我们的工作有三个贡献。首先，提出了一种名为 PtCAM 的方案，利用二进制 Patricia trie 来利用 TCAM 进行名称查找。其次，提出了几种提高效率和可扩展性的方法。第三，在各种姓名数据集上进行实验。结果表明，我们的方案有潜力实现几乎等于给定 TCAM 吞吐量的高速查找性能。值得注意的是，PtCAM可以在基于TCAM的IP线卡上实施，这意味着工业商业现成设备可以直接参与以信息为中心的创新和部署的推进。

items.title: ZooRoute: Enhancing Cloud-Scale Network Reliability via Overlay Proactive Rerouting.
items.abstract: This paper presents ZooRoute , a tenant-transparent, fast failure recovery service that requires no modifications to physical devices. ZooRoute leverages the overlay layer and enables traffic flows to bypass failures by altering source ports ( srcPorts ) in packet headers during encapsulation. To enable deployment in large-scale cloud networks, ZooRoute proposes: 1) On-demand probing to efficiently monitor a vast number of hosts while minimizing telemetry costs. 2) Table compression to record the states of numerous paths with limited on-chip resources. 3) A device-sensing mechanism to prevent unnecessary reconnections in stateful forwarding. Deployed in Alibaba Cloud for 18 months, ZooRoute has significantly improved network reliability, reducing cumulative outage time by 92.71%.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 ZooRoute，这是一种对租户透明的快速故障恢复服务，无需修改物理设备。 ZooRoute 利用覆盖层，通过在封装期间更改数据包标头中的源端口 ( srcPorts ) 来使流量绕过故障。为了实现大规模云网络中的部署，ZooRoute提出：1）按需探测，以有效监控大量主机，同时最大限度地降低遥测成本。 2）表压缩，以有限的片上资源记录大量路径的状态。 3) 设备感知机制，防止有状态转发中不必要的重新连接。 ZooRoute在阿里云部署18个月，网络可靠性显着提升，累计宕机时间减少92.71%。

items.title: DeepSpace: Super Resolution Powered Efficient and Reliable Satellite Image Data Acquistion.
items.abstract: Large constellations of low-earth orbit satellites enable frequent high-resolution earth imaging for numerous geospatial applications. They generate large volumes of data in space, hundreds of Terabytes per day, which much be transported to Earth through constrained intermittent connections to ground stations. The large volumes lead to large day-level delay in data download and exorbitant cloud storage costs. We propose DeepSpace, a new deep learning-based super-resolution approach that compresses satellite imagery by over two orders of magnitude, while preserving image quality using a tailored mixture of experts (MoE) super-resolution framework. DeepSpace reduces the network bandwidth requirements for space-Earth transfer, and can compress images for cloud storage. DeepSpace achieves such gains with the limited computational power available on small LEO satellites. We extensively evaluate DeepSpace against a wide range of state-of-the-art baselines considering multiple satellite image datasets and demonstrate the above mentioned benefits. We further demonstrate the effectiveness of DeepSpace through several distinct downstream applications (wildfire detection, land use and cropland classification, and fine-grained plastic detection in oceans).
items.abstract_zh: 大型低地球轨道卫星星座可以为众多地理空间应用提供频繁的高分辨率地球成像。它们在太空中生成大量数据，每天数百太字节，其中大部分数据通过与地面站的有限间歇性连接传输到地球。庞大的数据量导致数据下载的日级延迟和高昂的云存储成本。我们提出 DeepSpace，这是一种基于深度学习的新型超分辨率方法，可将卫星图像压缩两个数量级以上，同时使用定制的专家混合 (MoE) 超分辨率框架保持图像质量。 DeepSpace降低了天地传输的网络带宽要求，并且可以压缩图像以进行云存储。 DeepSpace 利用小型 LEO 卫星上有限的计算能力实现了这样的收益。我们考虑多个卫星图像数据集，根据各种最先进的基线对 DeepSpace 进行广泛评估，并展示上述优点。我们通过几个不同的下游应用（野火检测、土地利用和农田分类以及海洋中的细粒度塑料检测）进一步证明了 DeepSpace 的有效性。

items.title: Inter-domain Routing with Extensible Criteria.
items.abstract:
With the rapid evolution and diversification of Internet applications, their communication-quality criteria are continuously evolving. To globally optimize communication quality, the Internet's control plane thus needs to optimize inter-domain paths on diverse criteria, and should provide extensibility for adding new criteria or modifying existing ones. However, current inter-domain routing protocols and proposals satisfy these requirements at best to a limited degree.

We argue that an inter-domain routing architecture with extensible routing criteria can be realized in path-aware networks, due to their stateless forwarding. We thus propose IREC, an inter-domain routing architecture for the SCION path-aware Internet architecture that enables path optimization with extensible criteria. IREC achieves this through parallel execution and real-time addition of independent route computations, together enabling end domains to express their desired criteria to the control plane. Through large-scale simulations with realistic Internet topologies, we show IREC's viability via implementation and emulation, and its negligible global cost compared to static routing protocols.
items.abstract_zh:
随着互联网应用的快速发展和多样化，其通信质量标准也在不断发展。为了全局优化通信质量，互联网的控制平面需要根据不同的标准优化域间路径，并且应该提供可扩展性以添加新标准或修改现有标准。然而，当前的域间路由协议和建议最多只能在有限的程度上满足这些要求。

我们认为，由于其无状态转发，可以在路径感知网络中实现具有可扩展路由标准的域间路由架构。因此，我们提出了 IREC，这是一种用于 SCION 路径感知互联网架构的域间路由架构，可通过可扩展的标准实现路径优化。 IREC 通过并行执行和实时添加独立路由计算来实现这一目标，同时使端域能够向控制平面表达其所需的标准。通过使用真实互联网拓扑进行大规模模拟，我们通过实施和仿真展示了 IREC 的可行性，以及与静态路由协议相比其可忽略不计的全局成本。

items.title: Making Cellular Networks More Efficient By Roaming-in-Place.
items.abstract: We propose Roaming-in-Place (RinP), a technique for dynamically sharing capacity across mobile network operators. RinP is a new form of infrastructure sharing that expands the traditional notion of roaming in cellular networks such that users may roam between operators with overlapping coverage areas based on load and performance conditions. Using simulation and small-scale experiments, we show that deploying RinP would allow operators to run their networks at higher utilization and provide users with higher availability and performance, while achieving 30–40% infrastructure savings in our typical evaluation scenarios. We present a design for RinP that can be incrementally deployed with modest changes to existing cellular infrastructure. We build a prototype RinP testbed, and show that our proposed design can be realized feasibly with modest changes to existing cellular infrastructure, requires no change to current protocol standards, and adds minimal latency overheads.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了就地漫游 (RinP)，这是一种在移动网络运营商之间动态共享容量的技术。 RinP 是一种新形式的基础设施共享，它扩展了蜂窝网络中漫游的传统概念，以便用户可以根据负载和性能条件在具有重叠覆盖区域的运营商之间漫游。通过模拟和小规模实验，我们表明部署 RinP 将使运营商能够以更高的利用率运行其网络，并为用户提供更高的可用性和性能，同时在我们的典型评估场景中实现 30-40% 的基础设施节省。我们提出了一种 RinP 设计，可以通过对现有蜂窝基础设施进行适度更改来增量部署。我们构建了一个原型 RinP 测试台，并表明我们提出的设计可以通过对现有蜂窝基础设施进行适度更改来实现，无需更改当前协议标准，并且增加最小的延迟开销。

items.title: Coflow Scheduling for LLM Training.
items.abstract:
Training large language models (LLMs) generates diverse coflows within a cluster, requiring optimized scheduling to enhance communication-computation overlap and minimize training time. Existing schedulers inadequately handle contention both across and within coflows, resulting in suboptimal performance.

We present Hermod, a comprehensive coflow scheduler that orchestrates all coflow types for LLM training. The key insight behind Hermod is that coflows can be uniquely characterized by three model factors—microbatch ID, coflow type, and layer ID—enabling optimal scheduling decisions. Leveraging this insight, Hermod applies model-factor-driven inter-coflow priority scheduling aligned with the LLM training DAG. Preliminary simulation results show potential for performance improvements.
items.abstract_zh:
训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 在集群内生成不同的协同流，需要优化调度来增强通信计算重叠并最大限度地减少训练时间。 Existing schedulers inadequately handle contention both across and within coflows, resulting in suboptimal performance.

我们推出了 Hermod，一个综合的协流调度程序，可以协调 LLM 培训的所有协流类型。 Hermod 背后的关键见解是，协同流可以通过三个模型因素（微批次 ID、协同流类型和层 ID）进行独特表征，从而实现最佳调度决策。利用这种洞察力，Hermod 应用与 LLM 训练 DAG 一致的模型因子驱动的协流间优先级调度。初步模拟结果显示了性能改进的潜力。

items.title: Hawkeye: Diagnosing RDMA Network Performance Anomalies with PFC Provenance.
items.abstract: RDMA is becoming increasingly prevalent from private data centers to public multi-tenant clouds, due to its remarkable performance improvement. However, its lossless traffic control, i.e., PFC, introduces new complexities in network performance anomalies (NPAs) due to its cascading congestion spreading property, which usually incurs complaints from customers/applications about certain flows' performance degradation. Existing studies fall short in fine-grained visibility of PFC impact and traceability of PFC causality, and are thus ineffective in diagnosing the root causes for RDMA NPAs. In this paper, we propose Hawkeye, an accurate and efficient RDMA NPA diagnosis system based on PFC provenance. Hawkeye comprises 1) a fine-grained PFC-aware telemetry mechanism to record the PFC impact on flows; 2) an in-network PFC causality analysis and tracing mechanism to quickly and efficiently collect causal telemetry for diagnosis; and 3) a provenance-based diagnosis algorithm to comprehensively present the anomaly breakdown, identifying the anomaly type and root causes accurately. Through extensive evaluations on both NS-3 simulations and a Tofino testbed, Hawkeye can quickly and accurately diagnose multiple RDMA NPAs with over 90% precision and 1–4 orders of magnitude lower overhead than baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 由于其显着的性能提升，RDMA 从私有数据中心到公共多租户云变得越来越普遍。然而，其无损流量控制（即 PFC）由于其级联拥塞扩散特性，在网络性能异常（NPA）中引入了新的复杂性，这通常会引起客户/应用程序对某些流量性能下降的抱怨。现有研究缺乏 PFC 影响的细粒度可见性和 PFC 因果关系的可追溯性，因此无法有效诊断 RDMA NPA 的根本原因。在本文中，我们提出了 Hawkeye，一种基于 PFC 起源的准确高效的 RDMA NPA 诊断系统。 Hawkeye 包括 1) 细粒度 PFC 感知遥测机制，用于记录 PFC 对流量的影响； 2）网内PFC因果关系分析和追踪机制，可快速有效地收集因果遥测数据以进行诊断； 3）基于溯源的诊断算法，全面呈现异常故障，准确识别异常类型和根本原因。通过对 NS-3 模拟和 Tofino 测试台进行广泛评估，Hawkeye 可以快速准确地诊断多个 RDMA NPA，精度超过 90%，开销比基线低 1-4 个数量级。

items.title: S2: A Distributed Configuration Verifier for Hyper-Scale Networks.
items.abstract: Network configuration verifiers can proactively reason about a network's correctness to prevent network outages. However, even recent efforts have proposed algorithms to "scale up" the verification to several thousand switches, these algorithms still cannot be used for networks with more than 10K switches or 1000M routes, which is common for large service providers. In this paper, instead of further scaling up the verification limited to a single server, we study how to "scale out" the verification using the resources of multiple servers. To achieve this, we propose S2, a distributed verifier for network configurations. S2 partitions the network model and distributes the verification tasks, i.e. , control plane simulation and data plane verification, to run on multiple servers in parallel. Additionally, S2 uses prefix sharding during control plane simulation to further reduce the memory footprint on each server. We implement a prototype of S2 based on Batfish, the state-of-the-art network verifier. Based on real datacenter topologies of a large service provider and synthetic FatTree topologies, we show that S2 can verify networks with 10K routers and 1000M routes within 2 hours.
items.abstract_zh: 网络配置验证者可以主动推断网络的正确性，以防止网络中断。然而，即使最近提出了将验证“扩展”到数千台交换机的算法，这些算法仍然无法用于具有超过 10K 交换机或 1000M 路由的网络，而这对于大型服务提供商来说很常见。在本文中，我们不是进一步扩展仅限于单个服务器的验证，而是研究如何利用多个服务器的资源来“扩展”验证。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了 S2，一个用于网络配置的分布式验证器。 S2对网络模型进行划分，并将验证任务（即控制平面仿真和数据平面验证）分布在多个服务器上并行运行。此外，S2 在控制平面模拟期间使用前缀分片，以进一步减少每个服务器上的内存占用。我们基于最先进的网络验证器 Batfish 实现了 S2 原型。基于大型服务提供商的真实数据中心拓扑和合成的 FatTree 拓扑，我们表明 S2 可以在 2 小时内验证具有 10K 路由器和 1000M 路由的网络。

items.title: Acoustic Backscatter Network for Vehicle Body-in-White.
items.abstract: We present a novel approach to monitor the Body in White (BiW), the fundamental metallic structure of a vehicle. Existing monitoring methods, including both wired and wireless sensor systems, face significant challenges due to integration complexity, weight considerations, material costs, and signal blockage within the metallic environment. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Arach-Net, an acoustic backscatter network that leverages the conductive properties of the BiW to propagate vibration signals for energy transfer and data communication. This system comprises battery-free tags that harvest energy from BiW vibrations and utilize a backscatter technique for efficient communication, thereby eliminating the need for external power sources and reducing the power consumption. We address key challenges such as power sufficiency for tag activation and sustained operation, and collision reduction in network communication, by designing an ultra-low power backscatter tag and a distributed slot allocation protocol. We implement ArachNet, and deploy 12 tags onto the BiW of an electric SUV car. The evaluation results show that the power consumption of the tag is 51.0 μ W for uplink packet transmission, and 24.8 μ W for downlink packet reception. With our network protocol, the slot utilization can be up to 81.2%.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种监测白车身（BiW）的新颖方法，白车身是车辆的基本金属结构。由于集成复杂性、重量考虑、材料成本和金属环境中的信号阻塞，现有的监测方法（包括有线和无线传感器系统）面临着重大挑战。为了克服这些限制，我们引入了 Arach-Net，这是一种声学反向散射网络，它利用 BiW 的导电特性来传播振动信号，以实现能量传输和数据通信。该系统包含无电池标签，可从 BiW 振动中收集能量，并利用反向散射技术进行高效通信，从而无需外部电源并降低功耗。我们通过设计超低功耗反向散射标签和分布式时隙分配协议来解决关键挑战，例如标签激活和持续运行的电源充足性以及网络通信中的冲突减少。我们实施了 ArachNet，并将 12 个标签部署到电动 SUV 汽车的 BiW 上。评估结果显示，标签上行数据包发送功耗为51.0μW，下行数据包接收功耗为24.8μW。使用我们的网络协议，时隙利用率可以高达 81.2%。

items.title: Mobile Underwater Backscatter Networking.
items.abstract:
Underwater backscatter is a promising technology for ultra-low-power underwater networking, but existing systems break down in mobile scenarios. This paper presents EchoRider, the first system to enable reliable underwater backscatter networking under mobility.

EchoRider introduces three key components. First, it incorporates a robust and energy-efficient downlink architecture that uses chirp-modulated transmissions at the reader and a sub-Nyquist chirp decoder on backscatter nodes—bringing the resilience of LoRa-style signaling to underwater backscatter while remaining ultra-low-power. Second, it introduces a NACK-based full-duplex retransmission protocol , enabling efficient, reliable packet delivery. Third, it implements a Doppler-resilient uplink decoding pipeline that includes adaptive equalization, polar coding, and dynamic retraining to combat channel variation.

We built a full EchoRider prototype and evaluated it across over 1,200 real-world mobile experiments. EchoRider improves bit error rate by over 125× compared to a state-of-the-art baseline and maintains underwater goodput of 0.8 kbps at speeds up to 2.91 knots. In contrast, the baseline fails at speeds as low as 0.17 knots. Finally, we demonstrate EchoRider in end-to-end deployments involving mobile drones and sensor nodes, showing its effectiveness in practical underwater networked applications.
items.abstract_zh:
水下反向散射是一种很有前途的超低功耗水下网络技术，但现有系统在移动场景中会崩溃。本文介绍了 EchoRider，这是第一个在移动条件下实现可靠​​的水下反向散射网络的系统。

EchoRider 引入了三个关键组件。首先，它采用了强大且节能的下行链路架构，在读取器处使用线性调频脉冲调制传输，并在反向散射节点上使用亚奈奎斯特线性调频解码器，从而将 LoRa 式信令的弹性引入水下反向散射，同时保持超低功耗。其次，它引入了基于NACK的全双工重传协议，实现高效、可靠的数据包传输。第三，它实现了多普勒弹性上行链路解码管道，其中包括自适应均衡、极性编码和动态再训练，以应对信道变化。

我们构建了完整的 EchoRider 原型，并通过 1,200 多个实际移动实验对其进行了评估。与最先进的基线相比，EchoRider 将误码率提高了 125 倍以上，并在高达 2.91 节的速度下保持 0.8 kbps 的水下有效吞吐量。相比之下，基线在低至 0.17 节的速度时就会失效。最后，我们在涉及移动无人机和传感器节点的端到端部署中演示了 EchoRider，展示了其在实际水下网络应用中的有效性。

items.title: Intent-Driven Network Management with Multi-Agent LLMs: The Confucius Framework.
items.abstract: Advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) are significantly transforming network management practices. In this paper, we present our experience developing Confucius, a multi-agent framework for network management at Meta. We model network management workflows as directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) to aid planning. Our framework integrates LLMs with existing management tools to achieve seamless operational integration, employs retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to improve long-term memory, and establishes a set of primitives to systematically support human/model interaction. To ensure the accuracy of critical network operations, Confucius closely integrates with existing network validation methods and incorporates its own validation framework to prevent regressions. Remarkably, Confucius is a production-ready LLM development framework that has been operational for two years, with over 60 applications onboarded. To our knowledge, this is the first report on employing multi-agent LLMs for hyper-scale networks.
items.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的进步正在显着改变网络管理实践。在本文中，我们介绍了我们在 Meta 上开发一个用于网络管理的多智能体框架 Confucius 的经验。我们将网络管理工作流程建模为有向无环图 (DAG) 以帮助规划。我们的框架将法学硕士与现有管理工具集成以实现无缝操作集成，采用检索增强生成（RAG）来改善长期记忆，并建立一组原语来系统地支持人类/模型交互。为了确保关键网络操作的准确性，孔子与现有的网络验证方法紧密结合，并结合了自己的验证框架来防止回归。值得注意的是，Confucius 是一个可投入生产的 LLM 开发框架，已运行两年，已有 60 多个应用程序上线。据我们所知，这是第一份关于在超大规模网络中使用多代理法学硕士的报告。

items.title: Threading the Ocean: Mapping Digital Routes Across Submarine Cables using Calypso.
items.abstract: The Internet's connectivity relies on a fragile submarine cable network (SCN), yet existing tools fall short in assessing its criticality. We introduce Calypso, a new framework that leverages traceroute data to map traffic to submarine cables. Validated through real-world case studies, Calypso reveals hidden risks and offers new insights to enhancing SCN resilience.
items.abstract_zh: 互联网的连接依赖于脆弱的海底电缆网络 (SCN)，但现有工具无法评估其重要性。我们推出了 Calypso，这是一个新框架，它利用跟踪路由数据将流量映射到海底电缆。 Calypso 通过现实案例研究进行验证，揭示了隐藏的风险，并为增强 SCN 的弹性提供了新的见解。

items.title: Towards LLM-Based Failure Localization in Production-Scale Networks.
items.abstract: Root causing and failure localization are critical to maintain reliability in cloud network operations. When an incident is reported, network operators must review massive volumes of monitoring data and identify the root cause ( i.e. , error device) as fast as possible, making it extremely challenging even for experienced operators. Large language models (LLMs) have shown great potential in text understanding and reasoning. In this paper, we present BiAn, an LLM-based framework designed to assist operators in efficient incident investigation. BiAn processes monitoring data and generates error device rankings with detailed explanations. To date, BiAn has been deployed in our network infrastructure for 10 months and it has successfully assisted operators in identifying error devices more quickly, reducing time to root causing by 20.5% (55.2% for high-risk incidents). Extensive performance evaluations based on 17 months of real cases further demonstrate that BiAn achieves accurate and fast failure localization. It improves accuracy by 9.2% compared to the baseline approach.
items.abstract_zh: 根本原因和故障定位对于维持云网络运行的可靠性至关重要。当报告事件时，网络运营商必须审查大量监控数据并尽快找出根本原因（即错误设备），这使得即使对于经验丰富的运营商来说也极具挑战性。大型语言模型（LLM）在文本理解和推理方面表现出了巨大的潜力。在本文中，我们提出了 BiAn，一个基于法学硕士的框架，旨在帮助运营商进行有效的事件调查。 BiAn处理监控数据并生成错误设备排名并附有详细说明。迄今为止，BiAn 已在我们的网络基础设施中部署了 10 个月，它已成功帮助运营商更快地识别错误设备，将根源问题缩短了 20.5%（高风险事件为 55.2%）。基于17个月真实案例的广泛性能评估进一步证明BiAn实现了准确、快速的故障定位。与基线方法相比，它的准确率提高了 9.2%。

items.title: Scaling SCIERA: A Journey Through the Deployment of a Next-generation Network.
items.abstract:
The SCION Next-Generation Network (NGN) architecture has expanded steadily since 2017, with today 20+ ISPs offering SCION connectivity. In production, IP-to-SCION-to-IP translation by SCION-IP-Gateways (SIGs) is used, such that applications are unaware of the NGN communication. To accelerate innovation and deployments, our aim is to increase the number of native SCION use cases, where the application is fully SCION-aware and optimizes communication across all path choices offered by the network. We set out to achieve two core objectives: (1) facilitating simple native connectivity for applications, and (2) enhancing the scalability of SCION deployment at academic sites.

With these goals in mind, we built the SCION Education, Research, and Academic (SCIERA) network infrastructure. This paper presents key lessons learned from the SCIERA deployment, which we anticipate will offer actionable insights to researchers, network operators, and system builders seeking to overcome practical challenges also for other NGN deployments. We report on establishing native SCION connectivity at research and education institutions that can reach 250,000 people across five continents, without relying on BGP. Our evaluation demonstrates that our core objectives were reached. Today, the SCIERA deployment offers tangible real-world benefits to users by providing rich global connectivity through a multitude of inter-domain paths.
items.abstract_zh:
SCION 下一代网络 (NGN) 架构自 2017 年以来稳步扩展，目前已有 20 多家 ISP 提供 SCION 连接。在生产中，使用 SCION-IP-网关 (SIG) 进行 IP 到 SCION 到 IP 的转换，这样应用程序就不会意识到 NGN 通信。为了加速创新和部署，我们的目标是增加本机 SCION 用例的数量，其中应用程序完全支持 SCION，并优化网络提供的所有路径选择之间的通信。我们着手实现两个核心目标：(1) 促进应用程序的简单本机连接，(2) 增强 SCION 在学术场所部署的可扩展性。

考虑到这些目标，我们构建了 SCION 教育、研究和学术 (SCIERA) 网络基础设施。本文介绍了从 SCIERA 部署中吸取的重要经验教训，我们预计这些经验教训将为寻求克服其他 NGN 部署的实际挑战的研究人员、网络运营商和系统构建者提供可操作的见解。我们报告了在研究和教育机构建立本地 SCION 连接的情况，该连接可以覆盖五大洲的 250,000 人，而无需依赖 BGP。我们的评估表明我们的核心目标已经实现。如今，SCIERA 部署通过多种域间路径提供丰富的全球连接，为用户带来了切实的现实好处。

items.title: Hummingbird: Fast, Flexible, and Fair Inter-Domain Bandwidth Reservations.
items.abstract:
To realize the long-standing vision of providing quality-of-service (QoS) guarantees on a public Internet, this paper introduces Hummingbird: a lightweight QoS-system that provides fine-grained inter-domain reservations for end hosts.

Hummingbird enables flexible and composable reservations with end-to-end guarantees, and addresses an often overlooked, but crucial, aspect of bandwidth-reservation systems: incentivization of network providers. Hummingbird represents bandwidth reservations as tradable assets, allowing markets to emerge. These markets then ensure fair and efficient resource allocation and encourage deployment by remunerating providers. This incentivization is facilitated by decoupling reservations from network identities, which enables novel control-plane mechanisms and allows the design of a control plane based on smart contracts.

Hummingbird also provides an efficient reservation data plane, which streamlines the processing on routers and thus simplifies the implementation, deployment, and traffic policing, while maintaining robust security properties. Our prototype implementation demonstrates the efficiency and scalability of Hummingbird's asset-based control plane, and our high-speed software implementation can fill a 160 Gbps link with Hummingbird packets on commodity hardware.
items.abstract_zh:
为了实现在公共互联网上提供服务质量 (QoS) 保证的长期愿景，本文介绍了 Hummingbird：一种轻量级 QoS 系统，可为终端主机提供细粒度的域间预留。

Hummingbird 通过端到端保证实现灵活且可组合的预留，并解决了带宽预留系统中经常被忽视但至关重要的方面：网络提供商的激励。蜂鸟将带宽预留代表为可交易资产，从而允许市场出现。然后，这些市场可确保公平有效的资源分配，并鼓励为提供者提供报酬进行部署。通过将预留与网络身份解耦来促进这种激励，从而实现新颖的控制平面机制并允许基于智能合约设计控制平面。

Hummingbird 还提供高效的预留数据平面，简化路由器上的处理，从而简化实施、部署和流量监管，同时保持强大的安全属性。我们的原型实现展示了 Hummingbird 基于资产的控制平面的效率和可扩展性，我们的高速软件实现可以在商用硬件上用 Hummingbird 数据包填充 160 Gbps 链路。

items.title: From ATOP to ZCube: Automated Topology Optimization Pipeline and A Highly Cost-Effective Network Topology for Large Model Training.
items.abstract: The development of large language models (LLMs) poses new challenges in data center network topology design. To assist in exploring topology design, we propose ATOP, an Automated Topology Optimization Pipeline, which models network topology as a set of hyperparameters, enabling the discovery of potential topologies. With various optimization algorithms and customizable optimization objectives, ATOP achieves automated topology optimization on a scale of tens of thousands of GPUs. We apply ATOP on network topologies for 256, 1024, 4096, and 16384 GPUs, optimizing performance under LLMs training traffic patterns, collective communication performance, fault tolerance, and network cost. We also evaluate ATOP in different scenarios: building, optimizing, and expanding a data center. From ATOP's results, we discover a new topology — ZCube, which reaches the highest cost-effectiveness across various GPU scales. Simulation results show that ZCube, compared to the previous state-of-the-art topologies, including Rail-optimized Fat-tree (ROFT), Rail-only, and HPN, improves end-to-end LLM training speed by 3% to 7% and reduces network hardware costs by 26% to 46%. We also construct ZCube on a real-world testbed. Results show that ZCube reduces hardware costs by 25% compared to Rail-Optimized Topology while maintaining the same all-reduce and all-to-all performance.
items.abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）的发展给数据中心网络拓扑设计带来了新的挑战。为了帮助探索拓扑设计，我们提出了 ATOP，一种自动拓扑优化管道，它将网络拓扑建模为一组超参数，从而能够发现潜在的拓扑。 ATOP通过丰富的优化算法和可定制的优化目标，实现了数万GPU规模的自动化拓扑优化。我们在 256、1024、4096 和 16384 GPU 的网络拓扑上应用 ATOP，优化 LLM 训练流量模式下的性能、集体通信性能、容错能力和网络成本。我们还在不同场景中评估 ATOP：构建、优化和扩展数据中心。从ATOP的结果中，我们发现了一种新的拓扑——ZCube，它在各种GPU规模上达到了最高的成本效益。仿真结果表明，与之前最先进的拓扑（包括Rail-optimized Fat-tree（ROFT）、Rail-only和HPN）相比，ZCube将端到端LLM训练速度提高了3％至7％，并将网络硬件成本降低了26％至46％。我们还在现实世界的测试平台上构建了 ZCube。结果表明，与轨道优化拓扑相比，ZCube 降低了 25% 的硬件成本，同时保持相同的 all-reduce 和 all-to-all 性能。

items.title: SkyNet: Analyzing Alert Flooding from Severe Network Failures in Large Cloud Infrastructures.
items.abstract: For providers operating large-scale global networks, the timeliness of network failure recovery significantly affects the reliability of network services. Ideally, a network monitoring system should have enough coverage to detect even minor issues, but high coverage means alert floods during severe network failures. In practice, there is a gap between the flooding raw alerts data collected by network monitoring tools and the readable information needed for failure diagnosis. Existing solutions using limited network monitoring data sources and heuristic diagnostic rules, lack comprehensive coverage and the capability to address severe failures, especially which network operators have never handled a similar one before. This paper presents SkyNet, a network analysis system to extract scope and severity information from alert floods. SkyNet ensures comprehensive coverage by integrating multiple monitoring data sources through a uniform input format, enhancing extensibility for new network monitoring tools. During alert floods, SkyNet groups alerts, assesses their severity, and filters out insignificant ones to aid network operators in mitigating network failures. To date, SkyNet has been running stably on our network for one and a half years without any false negatives and has successfully reduced the time-to-mitigation for over 80% of network failures since its deployment in production.
items.abstract_zh: 对于运营大规模全球网络的提供商来说，网络故障恢复的及时性极大地影响着网络服务的可靠性。理想情况下，网络监控系统应该有足够的覆盖范围来检测即使是很小的问题，但高覆盖范围意味着在严重的网络故障期间警报泛滥。在实践中，网络监控工具收集的泛滥原始警报数据与故障诊断所需的可读信息之间存在差距。现有的解决方案使用有限的网络监控数据源和启发式诊断规则，缺乏全面的覆盖范围和解决严重故障的能力，尤其是网络运营商以前从未处理过的类似故障。本文介绍了 SkyNet，这是一个网络分析系统，用于从警报洪水中提取范围和严重性信息。 SkyNet通过统一的输入格式集成多个监控数据源，确保全面覆盖，增强了新网络监控工具的可扩展性。在警报泛滥期间，SkyNet 对警报进行分组、评估其严重性并过滤掉不重要的警报，以帮助网络运营商减轻网络故障。迄今为止，SkyNet 已在我们的网络上稳定运行了一年半，没有出现任何误报，并成功缩短了自部署生产以来超过 80% 的网络故障的缓解时间。

items.title: HardMesh: Enabling High-performance Service Mesh Ingress Processing with SmartNICs.
items.abstract: Service meshes have become essential for enabling microservices in cloud environments; however, they also introduce substantial network overhead. In particular, the ingress gateway, which serves as the primary entry point for external traffic, has emerged as a major performance bottleneck due to CPU-intensive traffic analysis and prolonged forwarding paths through multiple network stack layers. Our analysis indicates that these inefficiencies can result in a 4-fold reduction in network throughput and increased CPU resource consumption. In response, we propose HardMesh , a hardware-software hybrid ingress gateway that leverages a Smart-NIC for high-performance traffic analysis and efficient traffic routing. This process is augmented by a lightweight CPU-based proxy for traffic management. Evaluations show that HardMesh outperforms existing ingress gateways, achieving up to 4.4× higher throughput while providing the same range of traffic management services.
items.abstract_zh: 服务网格对于在云环境中启用微服务至关重要；然而，它们也带来了大量的网络开销。特别是，作为外部流量主要入口点的入口网关，由于 CPU 密集型流量分析和通过多个网络堆栈层的长时间转发路径，已成为主要性能瓶颈。我们的分析表明，这些低效率可能会导致网络吞吐量减少 4 倍，并增加 CPU 资源消耗。为此，我们提出了 HardMesh，这是一种硬件软件混合入口网关，利用智能 NIC 进行高性能流量分析和高效流量路由。这个过程通过基于 CPU 的轻量级流量管理代理得到增强。评估表明，HardMesh 的性能优于现有入口网关，在提供相同范围的流量管理服务的同时，吞吐量提高了 4.4 倍。

items.title: SCX: Stateless KV-Cache Encoding for Cloud-Scale Confidential Transformer Serving.
items.abstract: Transformer models have revolutionized fields like natural language processing and computer vision but face privacy concerns in sensitive applications such as medical diagnostics. Existing confidential serving methods, including cryptography-based, memory isolation-based, and access control-based, offer trade-offs between privacy and efficiency but often struggle with high latency or hardware dependencies. This work proposes stateless KV-cache encoding (SCX), a novel framework that encodes the intermediate key-value cache during Transformer inference using user-controlled keys. SCX ensures that the cloud can neither recover the input nor independently complete the next token prediction, effectively preserving privacy. By introducing efficient encoding and decoding schemes, SCX addresses communication complexity and attack vulnerabilities while ensuring zero loss of inference quality. Experiments on large Transformer models demonstrate that SCX achieves lower latency (e.g., 36ms for LLaMA-7B), outperforming state-of-the-art cryptography and memory isolation methods by orders of magnitude. Moreover, SCX can complementarily work with advanced KV-cache management techniques to further enhance KV-cache communication efficiency by 85%, marking a significant step toward practical, privacy-preserving large Transformer serving.
items.abstract_zh: Transformer 模型彻底改变了自然语言处理和计算机视觉等领域，但在医疗诊断等敏感应用中面临隐私问题。现有的机密服务方法，包括基于密码学、基于内存隔离和基于访问控制的方法，在隐私和效率之间提供了权衡，但常常面临高延迟或硬件依赖性的问题。这项工作提出了无状态 KV 缓存编码（SCX），这是一种新颖的框架，可在 Transformer 推理期间使用用户控制的密钥对中间键值缓存进行编码。 SCX确保云端既不能恢复输入，也不能独立完成下一个代币预测，有效保护隐私。通过引入高效的编码和解码方案，SCX 解决了通信复杂性和攻击漏洞，同时确保推理质量零损失。对大型 Transformer 模型的实验表明，SCX 实现了较低的延迟（例如，LLaMA-7B 为 36 毫秒），其性能优于最先进的密码学和内存隔离方法几个数量级。此外，SCX可以与先进的KV-cache管理技术互补，将KV-cache通信效率进一步提高85%，标志着向实用、保护隐私的大型Transformer服务迈出了重要一步。

items.title: NIER: Practical Neural-enhanced Low-bitrate Video Conferencing.
items.abstract: We present NIER, a video conferencing system that can adaptively maintain a low bitrate ( e.g. , 10–100 Kbps) with reasonable visual quality while being robust to packet losses. We use key-point-based deep image animation (DIA) as a key building block and address a series of networking and system challenges to make NIER practical. Our evaluations show that NIER significantly outperforms the baseline solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 NIER，这是一种视频会议系统，可以自适应地保持低比特率（例如 10-100 Kbps），具有合理的视觉质量，同时对数据包丢失具有鲁棒性。我们使用基于关键点的深度图像动画 (DIA) 作为关键构建块，并解决了一系列网络和系统挑战，使 NIER 变得实用。我们的评估表明 NIER 显着优于基准解决方案。

items.title: Towards Next-Generation Global IoT: Empowering Massive Connectivity with Harmonious Multi-Network Coexistence.
items.abstract: LoRaWAN offers a compelling solution for delivering cost-effective network access to millions of IoT devices worldwide. However, operators face challenges in scaling their services to meet the growing demands of IoT connections. Moreover, current LoRaWANs foster competition rather than cooperation among coexisting networks, resulting in substantial capacity degradation as network density increases. To identify the root causes limiting LoRaWAN scalability and to enable harmonious coexistence among network operators, this paper conducts an in-depth investigation of operational LoRaWANs. For the first time, our study reveals that the capacity degradation in LoRaWAN is not due to traditionally believed issues (such as wireless contention or interference) but rather a newly-identified decoder contention problem. This problem cannot be resolved using conventional approaches and hinders the scaled deployment of LoRaWANs as a global IoT infrastructure. Based on our new findings, we propose design principles that guide our exploration for effective strategies to address this emerging practical problem. We develop concrete deployable solutions to mitigate contention, optimize spectrum utilization, and promote spectrum sharing among network operators. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our strategies effectively boost network capacity close to the theoretical bound, and support the coexistence of up to six networks with significant improvement in spectrum efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: LoRaWAN 提供了一种引人注目的解决方案，可为全球数百万个物联网设备提供经济高效的网络访问。然而，运营商在扩展服务以满足物联网连接不断增长的需求方面面临挑战。此外，当前的 LoRaWAN 促进了共存网络之间的竞争而不是合作，导致随着网络密度的增加而导致容量大幅下降。为了找出限制 LoRaWAN 可扩展性的根本原因并实现网络运营商之间的和谐共存，本文对运营中的 LoRaWAN 进行了深入调查。我们的研究首次表明，LoRaWAN 中的容量下降并不是由于传统认为的问题（例如无线争用或干扰）造成的，而是新发现的解码器争用问题。这个问题无法使用传统方法解决，并且阻碍了 LoRaWAN 作为全球物联网基础设施的大规模部署。根据我们的新发现，我们提出了设计原则，指导我们探索有效策略来解决这一新出现的实际问题。我们开发具体的可部署解决方案，以缓解争用、优化频谱利用率并促进网络运营商之间的频谱共享。广泛的评估表明，我们的策略有效地将网络容量提升到接近理论极限，并支持多达六个网络的共存，并显着提高了频谱效率。

items.title: Pegasus: A Universal Framework for Scalable Deep Learning Inference on the Dataplane.
items.abstract: The paradigm of Intelligent DataPlane (IDP) embeds deep learning (DL) models on the network dataplane to enable intelligent traffic analysis at line-speed. However, the current use of the match-action table (MAT) abstraction on the dataplane is misaligned with DL inference, leading to several key limitations, including accuracy degradation, limited scale, and lack of generality. This paper proposes Pegasus to address these limitations. Pegasus translates DL operations into three dataplane-oriented primitives to achieve generality: Partition, Map, and SumReduce. Specifically, Partition "divides" high-dimensional features into multiple low-dimensional vectors, making them more suitable for the dataplane; Map "conquers" computations on the low-dimensional vectors in parallel with the technique of Fuzzy Matching, while SumReduce "combines" the computation results. Additionally, Pegasus employs Primitive Fusion to merge computations, improving scalability. Finally, Pegasus adopts full-precision weights with fixed-point activations to improve accuracy. Our implementation on a P4 switch demonstrates that Pegasus can effectively support various types of DL models, including Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP), Recurrent Neural Network (RNN), Convolutional Neural Network (CNN), and AutoEncoder models on the dataplane. Meanwhile, Pegasus outperforms state-of-the-art approaches with an average accuracy improvement of up to 22.8%, along with up to 248× larger model size and 212× larger input scale.
items.abstract_zh: 智能数据平面 (IDP) 的范例在网络数据平面上嵌入深度学习 (DL) 模型，以实现线速智能流量分析。然而，当前在数据平面上使用的匹配动作表 (MAT) 抽象与深度学习推理不一致，导致了几个关键限制，包括准确性下降、规模有限和缺乏通用性。本文提出 Pegasus 来解决这些限制。 Pegasus 将 DL 操作转换为三个面向数据平面的原语以实现通用性：Partition、Map 和 SumReduce。具体来说，Partition将高维特征“划分”为多个低维向量，使其更适合dataplane； Map 与模糊匹配技术并行地“征服”低维向量的计算，而 SumReduce 则“组合”计算结果。此外，Pegasus 采用 Primitive Fusion 来合并计算，提高可扩展性。最后，Pegasus 采用带有定点激活的全精度权重来提高准确性。我们在 P4 交换机上的实现表明，Pegasus 可以有效支持各种类型的深度学习模型，包括数据平面上的多层感知器 (MLP)、循环神经网络 (RNN)、卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和自动编码器模型。与此同时，Pegasus 的性能优于最先进的方法，平均准确度提高了 22.8%，模型尺寸扩大了 248 倍，输入规模扩大了 212 倍。

items.title: DistTrain: Addressing Model and Data Heterogeneity with Disaggregated Training for Multimodal Large Language Models.
items.abstract:
Multimodal large language models (LLMs) empower LLMs to ingest inputs and generate outputs in multiple forms, such as text, image, and audio. However, the integration of multiple modalities introduces heterogeneity in both the model and training data, creating unique systems challenges.

We propose DistTrain, a disaggregated training system for multimodal LLMs. DistTrain incorporates two novel disaggregation techniques to address model and data heterogeneity, respectively. The first is disaggregated model orchestration , which separates the training for modality encoder, LLM backbone, and modality generator. This allows the three components to adaptively and independently orchestrate their resources and parallelism configurations. The second is disaggregated data preprocessing , which decouples data preprocessing from training. This eliminates resource contention between preprocessing and training, and enables efficient data reordering to mitigate stragglers within and between micro-batches caused by data heterogeneity. We evaluate DistTrain across different sizes of multimodal LLMs on a large-scale production cluster. The experimental results show that DistTrain achieves 54.7% Model FLOPs Utilization (MFU) when training a 72B multimodal LLM on 1172 GPUs and outperforms Megatron-LM by up to 2.2× on training throughput.
items.abstract_zh:
多模态大语言模型 (LLM) 使 LLM 能够摄取输入并生成多种形式的输出，例如文本、图像和音频。然而，多种模式的集成在模型和训练数据中引入了异质性，从而带来了独特的系统挑战。

我们提出了 DistTrain，这是一个针对多模式法学硕士的分类培训系统。 DistTrain 结合了两种新颖的分解技术，分别解决模型和数据异构性。第一个是分类模型编排，它将模态编码器、LLM 主干和模态生成器的训练分开。这使得三个组件能够自适应且独立地编排其资源和并行配置。第二个是分解数据预处理，它将数据预处理与训练分离。这消除了预处理和训练之间的资源争用，并实现高效的数据重新排序，以减轻微批次内和微批次之间由数据异构性引起的落后者。我们在大规模生产集群上评估不同规模的多模式 LLM 的 DistTrain。实验结果表明，在 1172 个 GPU 上训练 72B 多模态 LLM 时，DistTrain 实现了 54.7% 的模型 FLOP 利用率 (MFU)，并且在训练吞吐量方面优于 Megatron-LM 高达 2.2 倍。

items.title: The Sweet Danger of Sugar: Debunking Representation Learning for Encrypted Traffic Classification.
items.abstract: Recently we have witnessed the explosion of proposals that, inspired by Language Models like BERT, exploit Representation Learning models to create traffic representations. All of them promise astonishing performance in encrypted traffic classification (up to 98% accuracy). In this paper, with a networking expert mindset, we critically reassess their performance. Through extensive analysis, we demonstrate that the reported successes are heavily influenced by data preparation problems, which allow these models to find easy shortcuts - spurious correlation between features and labels - during fine-tuning that unrealistically boost their performance. When such shortcuts are not present - as in real scenarios - these models perform poorly. We also introduce Pcap-Encoder , an LM-based representation learning model that we specifically design to extract features from protocol headers. Pcap-Encoder appears to be the only model that provides an instrumental representation for traffic classification. Yet, its complexity questions its applicability in practical settings. Our findings reveal flaws in dataset preparation and model training, calling for a better and more conscious test design. We propose a correct evaluation methodology and stress the need for rigorous benchmarking.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，我们目睹了提案的激增，这些提案受到 BERT 等语言模型的启发，利用表示学习模型来创建流量表示。它们都承诺在加密流量分类方面具有惊人的性能（准确率高达 98%）。在本文中，我们以网络专家的心态，批判性地重新评估他们的表现。通过广泛的分析，我们证明所报告的成功很大程度上受到数据准备问题的影响，这使得这些模型在微调过程中找到了简单的捷径——特征和标签之间的虚假相关性，从而不切实际地提高了它们的性能。当不存在这样的快捷方式时（如在实际场景中），这些模型的性能会很差。我们还介绍了 Pcap-Encoder，这是一种基于 LM 的表示学习模型，我们专门设计它来从协议标头中提取特征。 Pcap-Encoder 似乎是唯一为流量分类提供工具表示的模型。然而，其复杂性质疑其在实际环境中的适用性。我们的研究结果揭示了数据集准备和模型训练方面的缺陷，需要更好、更有意识的测试设计。我们提出了正确的评估方法，并强调需要严格的基准测试。

items.title: StarCDN: Moving Content Delivery Networks to Space.
items.abstract: Low Earth Orbit (LEO) satellite networks, such as Starlink, provide global internet access and currently serve content to millions of users. Recent work has shown that existing network infrastructures, such as Content Delivery Networks (CDNs), are not well-suited to satellite network architectures. Traditional terrestrial CDNs degrade performance for satellite network users and do not alleviate the congestion in the ground-satellite links. We design StarCDN, a new CDN architecture that caches content in space to improve user experience and reduce ground-satellite bandwidth usage. The fundamental challenge in designing StarCDN lies in the orbital motion of satellites, which causes each satellite's coverage area to change rapidly, serving vastly different regions (e.g., US and Europe) within minutes. To address this, we introduce new consistent hashing and relayed fetching schemes tailored to LEO satellite networks. Our design enables cached content to flow in the opposite direction of the orbital motion to counter satellite motion. We evaluate StarCDN against multiple baselines using real-world traces from Akamai. Our evaluation demonstrates that StarCDN can reduce the ground-to-satellite bandwidth utilization by 80% and improve user-perceived latency by 2.5X. Further, we make available an open-source trace generator, SpaceGEN, for realistic simulations of satellite-based CDNs.
items.abstract_zh: 低地球轨道 (LEO) 卫星网络（例如 Starlink）提供全球互联网接入，目前为数百万用户提供内容。最近的研究表明，现有的网络基础设施，例如内容交付网络（CDN），不太适合卫星网络架构。传统的地面 CDN 会降低卫星网络用户的性能，并且不能缓解地面卫星链路的拥塞。我们设计了 StarCDN，这是一种新的 CDN 架构，可在太空中缓存内容，以改善用户体验并减少地面卫星带宽使用。设计 StarCDN 的根本挑战在于卫星的轨道运动，这会导致每颗卫星的覆盖区域快速变化，在几分钟内为截然不同的地区（例如美国和欧洲）提供服务。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了专为 LEO 卫星网络量身定制的新的一致哈希和中继获取方案。我们的设计使缓存的内容能够沿轨道运动的相反方向流动，以对抗卫星运动。我们使用 Akamai 的真实跟踪数据，根据多个基线来评估 StarCDN。我们的评估表明，StarCDN 可以将地面到卫星的带宽利用率降低 80%，并将用户感知的延迟提高 2.5 倍。此外，我们还提供开源跟踪生成器 SpaceGEN，用于基于卫星的 CDN 的真实模拟。

items.title: MegaScale-Infer: Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Model Serving with Disaggregated Expert Parallelism.
items.abstract:
Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) showcases tremendous potential to scale large language models (LLMs) with enhanced performance and reduced computational complexity. However, its sparsely activated architecture shifts feed-forward networks (FFNs) from being compute-intensive to memory-intensive during inference, leading to substantially lower GPU utilization and increased operational costs.

We present MegaScale-Infer, an efficient and cost-effective system for serving large-scale MoE models. MegaScale-Infer disaggregates attention and FFN modules within each model layer, enabling independent scaling, tailored parallelism strategies, and heterogeneous deployment for both modules. To fully exploit disaggregation in the presence of MoE's sparsity, MegaScale-Infer introduces ping-pong pipeline parallelism , which partitions a request batch into micro-batches and shuttles them between attention and FFNs for inference. Combined with distinct model parallelism for each module, MegaScale-Infer effectively hides communication overhead and maximizes GPU utilization. To adapt to disaggregated attention and FFN modules and minimize data transmission overhead (e.g., token dispatch), MegaScale-Infer provides a high-performance M2N communication library that eliminates unnecessary GPU-to-CPU data copies, group initialization overhead, and GPU synchronization. Experimental results indicate that MegaScale-Infer achieves up to 1.90× higher per-GPU throughput than state-of-the-art solutions.
items.abstract_zh:
专家混合 (MoE) 展示了扩展大型语言模型 (LLM) 的巨大潜力，同时增强了性能并降低了计算复杂性。然而，其稀疏激活的架构在推理过程中将前馈网络 (FFN) 从计算密集型转变为内存密集型，从而导致 GPU 利用率大幅降低并增加运营成本。

我们推出 MegaScale-Infer，这是一种高效且经济高效的系统，用于为大规模 MoE 模型提供服务。 MegaScale-Infer 将注意力模块和 FFN 模块分解在每个模型层中，从而实现两个模块的独立扩展、定制并行策略和异构部署。为了在 MoE 稀疏性的情况下充分利用分解，MegaScale-Infer 引入了乒乓管道并行性，它将请求批次划分为微批次，并在注意力和 FFN 之间穿梭以进行推理。结合每个模块独特的模型并行性，MegaScale-Infer 有效隐藏了通信开销并最大限度地提高了 GPU 利用率。为了适应分解注意力和 FFN 模块并最大限度地减少数据传输开销（例如令牌调度），MegaScale-Infer 提供了高性能 M2N 通信库，消除了不必要的 GPU 到 CPU 数据复制、组初始化开销和 GPU 同步。实验结果表明，MegaScale-Infer 的每 GPU 吞吐量比最先进的解决方案高出 1.90 倍。
